2603.26818v1.title: Multi-GPU fast Fourier transforms in MATLAB (for large-scale phase-field crystal simulations)
2603.26818v1.summary: We present a MATLAB-based framework for two- and three-dimensional fast Fourier transforms on multiple GPUs for large-scale numerical simulations using the pseudo-spectral Fourier method. The software implements two complementary multi-GPU strategies that overcome single-GPU memory limitations and accelerate spectral solvers. This approach is motivated by and applied to phase-field crystal (PFC) models, which are governed by tenth-order partial differential equations, require fine spatial resolution, and are typically formulated in periodic domains. Our resulting numerical framework achieves significant speedups, approximately sixfold for standard PFC simulations and up to sixtyfold for multiphysics extensions, compared to a purely CPU-based implementation running on hundreds of cores.
2603.26818v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了相场晶体（PFC）模型大规模数值模拟中的计算效率瓶颈问题，特别是针对十阶偏微分方程求解需要精细空间分辨率和周期性边界条件的挑战。现有方法受限于单GPU内存容量限制，无法处理大规模三维PFC模拟，而传统CPU并行计算效率较低。该工作的创新点在于开发了基于MATLAB的多GPU快速傅里叶变换框架，实现了两种互补的多GPU策略来突破内存限制并加速谱方法求解器。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用伪谱傅里叶方法求解相场晶体模型的十阶偏微分方程，使用快速傅里叶变换（FFT）作为核心数值算法。控制方程为PFC模型的十阶偏微分方程，在周期性边界条件下进行求解。软件框架基于MATLAB平台开发，实现了二维和三维多GPU并行FFT算法。两种多GPU策略包括内存分布策略和计算加速策略，用于克服单GPU内存限制。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、网格规模、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。该框架专门针对需要精细空间分辨率的大规模PFC模拟设计，支持多物理耦合扩展。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

多GPU框架相比纯CPU实现在数百个核心上运行，标准PFC模拟实现了约6倍的加速比，多物理耦合扩展模拟达到了高达60倍的显著加速。该性能提升验证了多GPU策略在处理大规模谱方法计算中的有效性。摘要未提及与其他GPU实现或商业软件的具体对比数据，也未给出绝对计算时间或内存使用量的定量指标，需查阅全文获取更详细的性能基准测试结果。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多GPU FFT框架可以直接应用于我的XPFC（扩展相场晶体）模型研究，特别是在处理大规模三维晶体缺陷演化和多物理耦合问题时。多GPU内存分布策略可以解决我在大尺寸金属疲劳模拟中遇到的内存限制问题，60倍的多物理耦合加速比对我的温度-应力耦合场模拟具有重要价值。该框架的MATLAB实现便于与我现有的PFC代码集成，两种互补的多GPU策略为我的分子动力学-相场晶体多尺度耦合提供了高效的数值求解方案。周期性边界条件的优化处理可以直接借鉴到我的金属拉伸变形模拟中的晶粒边界建模。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了基本的软件框架信息和性能提升数据，但缺少具体的实现细节、GPU硬件配置、测试用例参数等关键复现信息。建议重点精读方法部分了解两种多GPU策略的具体实现，以及结果部分的详细性能基准测试和参数敏感性分析章节。

brief_cn.meaning: 该论文的多GPU FFT框架可以直接应用于我的XPFC（扩展相场晶体）模型研究，特别是在处理大规模三维晶体缺陷演化和多物理耦合问题时。多GPU内存分布策略可以解决我在大尺寸金属疲劳模拟中遇到的内存限制问题，60倍的多物理耦合加速比对我的温度-应力耦合场模拟具有重要价值。该框架的MATLAB实现便于与我现有的PFC代码集成，两种互补的多GPU策略为我的分子动力学-相场晶体多尺度耦合提供了高效的数值求解方案。周期性边界条件的优化处理可以直接借鉴到我的金属拉伸变形模拟中的晶粒边界建模。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: Multi-GPU fast Fourier transforms in MATLAB for large-scale phase-field crystal simulations Maik Punke ∗ Marco Salvalaglio ∗† March 31, 2026 Summary We present a MATLAB-based framework for two- and three-dimensional fast Fourier transforms on multiple GPUs for large-scale numerical simulations using the pseudo-spectral Fourier method. The software implements two complementary multi-GPU strategies that overcome single-GPU memory limitations and accelerate spectral solvers. This approach is motivated by and applied to phase-field crystal (PFC) models, which are governed by tenth-order partial differential equations, require fine spatial resolution, and are typically formulated in periodic domains. Our resulting numerical framework achieves significant speedups, approximately sixfold for standard PFC simulations and up to sixtyfold for multiphysics extensions, compared to a purely CPU-based implementation running on hundreds of cores. Statement of need Large-scale simulations based on the pseudo-spectral Fourier method [1] are often limited by the memory capacity and performance of single GPUs due to their reliance on repeated multidimensional fast Fourier transforms (FFTs). To address this bottleneck, we present two c signing different physical fields to separate GPUs with synchronized communication. In the following, phase-field crystal (PFC) models [2, 3, 4] serve as a representative application that underscores the need for such multi-GPU capabilities. PFC models resolve crystalline order at atomic length scales while evolving on large (diffusive) time scales, enabling...

2603.20689v1.title: Emerging hierarchical dislocation structures: Insights from scanning electron microscopy-electron backscatter diffraction in situ tensile testing and multifractal analysis
2603.20689v1.summary: Understanding the evolution of dislocation structures during plastic deformation is critical for predicting the mechanical performance of metallic materials. In this work, we applied in situ scanning electron microscopy/electron backscatter diffraction tensile testing combined with multifractal (MF) analysis to assess deformation-induced dislocation structure evolution in solution-annealed 304L stainless steel, both in its as-received and neutron-irradiated states (5.4 displacements per atom). The analysis of kernel average misorientation patterns revealed the formation of hierarchical dislocation arrangements that exhibit clear MF scaling behavior. Despite pronounced visual differences between nonirradiated and irradiated specimens -- most notably, the appearance of dislocation channels after irradiation -- the singularity spectra suggest that both conditions give rise to similar underlying hierarchical structures. MF analysis provides a quantitative measure of the spatial complexity and self-organization of dislocation patterns, highlighting the accelerated emergence and evolution of the dislocation structures in irradiated polycrystalline materials, as well as the limitation of their spatial extent. The findings indicate that irradiation not only modifies microstructure but also alters correlation-driven dislocation organization. More generally, they demonstrate that MF analysis is a powerful tool for probing mesoscale deformation mechanisms.
2603.20689v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决塑性变形过程中位错结构演化的定量表征问题，特别是在辐照环境下金属材料的位错组织行为。现有方法主要依赖定性观察和简单统计分析，难以准确描述位错结构的空间复杂性和自组织特征。该工作创新性地将原位SEM-EBSD拉伸测试与多重分形分析相结合，为位错结构的分层组织提供了定量化的数学描述框架。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

采用原位扫描电镜-电子背散射衍射（SEM-EBSD）拉伸测试技术，结合多重分形（MF）分析方法研究位错结构演化。实验材料为固溶退火态304L不锈钢，包括未辐照态和中子辐照态（5.4 dpa辐照剂量）两种状态。通过核平均取向差（KAM）模式分析揭示分层位错排列的形成过程。多重分形分析基于奇异性谱理论框架，用于定量评估位错模式的空间复杂性和自组织特征。摘要未提及具体的应变率、温度条件、试样尺寸等关键实验参数，需查阅全文获取。边界条件设置和加载方式的具体细节在摘要中未明确说明。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现辐照和非辐照试样都表现出相似的分层位错结构和多重分形标度行为，尽管在视觉上存在显著差异（辐照后出现位错通道）。辐照态材料中位错结构的出现和演化速度明显加快，但其空间范围受到限制。多重分形分析的奇异性谱表明两种状态下都形成了相似的潜在分层结构。摘要未提及具体的应力数值、变形量或多重分形参数的定量结果，需查阅全文获取详细数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多重分形分析方法可以直接应用于我的分子动力学和相场晶体模型中位错结构的定量表征，特别是在金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中评估位错网络的空间复杂性。KAM分析技术可以与我的XPFC模型结合，用于验证模拟中位错结构的分层组织特征。辐照效应对位错组织的影响机制为我的多物理耦合场模拟提供了重要的物理基础，特别是在考虑辐照损伤与机械变形耦合效应时。该工作的定量分析框架可以作为我模拟结果验证的重要参考标准。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了材料类型、辐照剂量和主要分析方法，但缺少关键的实验参数如应变率、温度、试样几何尺寸等信息，需查阅全文获取完整的实验设计细节。建议重点精读实验方法部分和多重分形分析的数学框架章节，以及结果中关于奇异性谱的定量数据分析部分。

This is an open access article under the CC BY license ( http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ ). dislocation distributions and the effects of different processes, such as irradiation. Because of its ability to reveal grain and subgrain structures in detail, EBSD has been widely employed for studying deformation mechanisms and strain-induced processes [ 10 – 12 ] to derive information on heterogeneous dislocation structures. This capability led to the next logical step: coupling EBSD with mechanical testing. Such a combina - tion allows for in-depth assessment of deformation processes at various length scales, covering a wide range of stress and strain levels [ 13 ]. Several limitations of EBSD analysis are also worth mentioning in this context. For instance, EBSD is fundamentally confined to the spec - imen surface unless destructive methods are employed. In addition, although methods have been proposed to estimate the total dislocation density (see, for instance, [ 14 ]), only the GND density can currently be measured reliably, whereas statistically stored dislocations remain difficult to assess. Finally, in situ testing requires interruption of the deformation process for data acquisition, leading to minor relaxation effects. 1.1.2. 2604.09084v1.title: Force Field-Agnostic Phase Classification of Zeolitic Imidazolate Framework Polymorphs
2604.09084v1.summary: Zeolitic Imidazolate Frameworks (ZIFs) are a family of metal--organic frameworks that feature metal centers tetrahedrally linked to imidazole-based ligands and adopt zeolite-like topologies. ZIFs formed by Zinc cations and imidazolate linkers exhibit a remarkable degree of polymorphism, which can be modulated by varying synthesis parameters or thermodynamic conditions (i.e., temperature and pressure). Computer simulations provide a unique way of studying these materials and their phase transitions from the microscopic standpoint, revealing their underlying molecular mechanisms. However, studying these mechanisms requires to be able to classify the phase of each molecular entity in an agnostic and automatic fashion, which is particularly challenging when the two phases involved are structurally very similar. In this work, we systematically study neural network classifiers to classify ZIF phases on-the-fly during molecular dynamics simulations. We test a variety of input features, differing both in the dimensionality and nature of the descriptors and in the kind of force field used for building the training/testing database. We reveal that even with low-dimensional descriptors the classification is highly accurate, while the use of high-dimensional descriptors leads to an even better performance. Training the classifier with configurations coming from different force fields we can remove force field bias and enhance the classifier performance and general applicability. Finally, we apply our classifiers to reveal mechanistic details of the ZIF-4-cp $\xrightarrow{}$ ZIF-4-cp-II phase transition.
2604.09084v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了沸石咪唑酯骨架材料（ZIFs）多晶型相变过程中的自动相分类问题，特别是针对结构高度相似的ZIF-4-cp和ZIF-4-cp-II相之间的转变。现有方法在识别结构相似的多晶型时存在准确性不足和力场依赖性强的局限性，无法在分子动力学模拟过程中实现实时、自动化的相分类。该工作的创新点在于开发了力场无关的神经网络分类器，能够在MD模拟过程中实时识别ZIF相态，并揭示相变的微观机制。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用分子动力学（MD）模拟结合神经网络机器学习方法进行ZIF相分类。摘要未提及具体的势函数类型和MD软件平台，需查阅全文获取详细信息。研究系统测试了不同维度和性质的输入特征描述符，包括低维和高维描述符用于神经网络训练。关键创新在于使用来自不同力场的构型数据构建训练和测试数据库，以消除力场偏差并提高分类器的通用性。模拟重点关注锌阳离子和咪唑配体形成的ZIF体系，采用四面体配位结构。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文。边界条件和加载方式的具体设置同样需要查阅全文确认。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现即使使用低维描述符也能实现高精度的相分类，而高维描述符的使用进一步提升了分类性能。通过整合不同力场的训练数据，成功消除了力场偏差，显著增强了分类器的性能和通用适用性。该方法成功应用于ZIF-4-cp到ZIF-4-cp-II相变的机理研究，揭示了相变过程的微观细节。摘要未提供具体的分类准确率数值、温度压力范围等定量参数，需查阅全文获取详细数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的神经网络相分类方法可以直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟和分子动力学研究中，特别是在金属疲劳和拉伸变形过程中的相变识别。力场无关的分类器设计思路对我的XPFC模型验证具有重要参考价值，可以用于不同理论框架下的结果对比验证。该工作中使用多种力场数据训练以消除偏差的策略，可以借鉴到我的金属疲劳模拟中，通过整合不同势函数的结果提高模型的可靠性。实时相分类的技术路线对我研究拉伸变形过程中的微观结构演化具有直接指导意义。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

2604.11513v1.title: Machine-learning modeling of magnetization dynamics in quasi-equilibrium and driven metallic spin systems
2604.11513v1.summary: We review recent advances in machine-learning (ML) force-field methods for large-scale Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert (LLG) simulations of metallic spin systems. We generalize the Behler-Parrinello (BP) ML architecture -- originally developed for quantum molecular dynamics -- to construct scalable and transferable ML models capable of capturing the intricate dependence of electron-mediated exchange fields on the local magnetic environment characteristic of itinerant magnets. A central ingredient of this framework is the implementation of symmetry-aware magnetic descriptors based on group-theoretical bispectrum formalisms. Leveraging these ML force fields, LLG simulations faithfully reproduce hallmark non-collinear magnetic orders -- such as the $120^\circ$ and tetrahedral states -- on the triangular lattice, and successfully capture the complex spin textures emerging in the mixed-phase states of a square-lattice double-exchange model under thermal quench. We further discuss a generalized potential theory that extends the BP formalism to incorporate both conservative and nonconservative electronic torques, thereby enabling ML models to learn nonequilibrium exchange fields from computationally demanding microscopic approaches such as nonequilibrium Green's-function techniques. This extension yields quantitatively accurate predictions of voltage-driven domain-wall motion and establishes a foundation for quantum-accurate, multiscale modeling of nonequilibrium spin dynamics and spintronic functionalities.

2604.10561v1.title: Location of the liquid-vapor critical point in aluminum
2604.10561v1.summary: The precise location of the liquid-vapor critical point (CP) in aluminum has remained elusive for decades, with reported critical temperatures spanning nearly 4000~K. Here we resolve this long-standing uncertainty by combining deep potential molecular dynamics with large-scale simulations trained on high-fidelity electronic-structure data. We benchmark multiple exchange-correlation functionals against experimental liquid densities and identify PBEsol as providing the most consistent description. Using complementary approaches -- spinodal analysis of the equation of state and direct coexistence simulations with Gaussian mixture phase identification -- we converge on a critical temperature of $6531$-$6576$~K, a critical density of $0.637$~g/cm$^{3}$, and a critical pressure of $1.6$~kbar. The precision of these values, with uncertainties of $\sim$50~K in temperature, represents a step change over previous estimates. Our framework establishes a transferable strategy for predicting critical phenomena in metals, with implications for laser ablation, shock compression, and planetary modeling under extreme conditions.
2604.10561v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决铝材料液-气相变临界点精确定位的长期科学难题，此前报告的临界温度跨度高达4000K，存在巨大不确定性。现有方法的局限性在于缺乏高精度的原子间势函数和大规模模拟能力，无法准确描述极端条件下的相变行为。该工作的创新点是结合深度势函数分子动力学与基于高保真电子结构数据的大规模模拟，建立了金属临界现象预测的可转移框架。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

使用深度势函数分子动力学(Deep Potential Molecular Dynamics)方法，基于高保真电子结构数据训练势函数。通过对比多种交换相关泛函与实验液体密度数据，确定PBEsol泛函提供最一致的描述。采用两种互补方法：状态方程的旋节分析和直接共存模拟结合高斯混合相识别技术。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。摘要未明确说明使用的软件平台，但深度势函数通常与LAMMPS等分子动力学软件结合使用。边界条件和加载方式的具体设置在摘要中未提及，需查阅全文。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

确定铝的临界温度为6531-6576K，临界密度为0.637g/cm³，临界压力为1.6kbar。温度不确定性约为50K，相比之前估计值实现了精度的显著提升。摘要未提及与已有实验或模拟结果的具体对比数值，需查阅全文了解详细的验证情况。该方法建立了预测金属临界现象的可转移策略，适用于激光烧蚀、冲击压缩和极端条件下行星建模等应用。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

深度势函数分子动力学方法可直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟研究，特别是在处理极端条件下的金属相变行为。旋节分析和直接共存模拟的互补验证策略对我的相场晶体模型(XPFC)验证具有重要参考价值。PBEsol泛函的选择为我在进行第一性原理计算时提供了可靠的参数基准。高斯混合相识别技术可借鉴用于我的金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中的相变和缺陷识别。该工作建立的可转移预测框架对我开发多尺度模拟方法具有重要启发意义。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了关键的临界点数值参数，但缺少模拟尺寸、时间步长、势函数训练细节等关键技术参数，需查阅全文获取完整的复现信息。建议重点精读方法学部分了解深度势函数训练过程、旋节分析的具体实现方法，以及结果部分的详细验证数据和误差分析。

brief_cn.what_done: 该论文解决铝材料液-气相变临界点精确定位的长期科学难题，此前报告的临界温度跨度高达4000K，存在巨大不确定性。现有方法的局限性在于缺乏高精度的原子间势函数和大规模模拟能力，无法准确描述极端条件下的相变行为。该工作的创新点是结合深度势函数分子动力学与基于高保真电子结构数据的大规模模拟，建立了金属临界现象预测的可转移框架。
brief_cn.method: 使用深度势函数分子动力学(Deep Potential Molecular Dynamics)方法，基于高保真电子结构数据训练势函数。通过对比多种交换相关泛函与实验液体密度数据，确定PBEsol泛函提供最一致的描述。采用两种互补方法：状态方程的旋节分析和直接共存模拟结合高斯混合相识别技术。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。摘要未明确说明使用的软件平台，但深度势函数通常与LAMMPS等分子动力学软件结合使用。边界条件和加载方式的具体设置在摘要中未提及，需查阅全文。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: 9500 K, and critical density (ρ c) spans from 0.28 g/cm 3 to 1.03 g/cm 3 [12–20]. Some of them do not even provide critical pressure,P c. On one hand, experimentally, direct measurements of aluminum’s critical point are challenging due to the difficulty in maintaining and diagnosing under static conditions the high temperature and pressures required. Therefore, most results rely on assumed rules for all liquid metals or the extrapolation of thermodynamic data obtained at lower temperatures [11]. On the other hand, as the system approaches the critical point, thermal fluctuations increasingly dominate. It is notoriously difficult to capture, which motivates the development of various theoretical approaches, including the famous theory of renormalization group [21–24]. Beyond reflecting the strong dependence of critical parameters on the choice of theoretical framework and com- putational methodology, this uncertainty underscores a fundamental gap in our understanding of aluminum’s phase behavior. Such variability complicates both predictive modeling and experimental interpretation, emphasizing the need for reliable, physically consistent descriptions of aluminum’s critical phenomena to enable unified theoretical and practical applications. As a result, there is a pressing need for advanced computational methods that can provide more accurate predictions and insights into the critical phenomena of aluminum. In this work, we address this challenge by leveraging the power of machine learning to develop interatomic potentials that can capture the complex interactions in alumi...

2604.11397v1.title: Revealing Dislocation Interactions Controlling Mechanical Properties of Metals
2604.11397v1.summary: During plastic deformation, metals change shape while continuously becoming stronger. The microscopic origin of these processes lies in the proliferation and movement of line defects, dislocations, and the subsequent self-organisation and pinning of dislocations on lattice imperfections, including other dislocations. The nature of these multiscale processes has remained elusive because in situ observations have not been feasible. We present 3D movies of how dislocations pile up near an obstacle, deeply within a mm-sized pure Al sample and during tensile deformation. Cross-slip is found to provide a mechanism for the dislocations to escape the pile-up, leading to pronounced intermittent behaviour. Such data support a new generation of dislocation dynamics and micro-mechanics modelling.

2) 核心方法与模型细节

6) 摘要原文
- During plastic deformation, metals change shape while continuously becoming stronger. The microscopic origin of these processes lies in the proliferation and movement of line defects, dislocations, and the subsequent self-organisation and pinning of dislocations on lattice imperfections, including other dislocations. The nature of these multiscale processes has remained elusive because in situ observations have not been feasible. We present 3D movies of how dislocations pile up near an obstacle, deeply within a mm-sized pure Al sample and during tensile deformation. Cross-slip is found to provide a mechanism for the dislocations to escape the pile-up, leading to pronounced intermittent behaviour. Such data support a new generation of dislocation dynamics and micro-mechanics modelling.

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: Methods A.1 In Situ Load Frame and Sample Geometry The load frame is a remotely operated, miniature tensile machine moun ted on the goniometer stack. It features two synchronously moving traver ses, driven by spindles with opposed threading. This conﬁguration maintains a quasi-stead y central section during sample elongation, minimising displacement of the gauge area. T he deformation process is controlled through geared stepper motors with an eﬀec tive step size of ∆ l = 0. 211 µm giving rise to a minimum elongation of 0 . 002 % for the sample’s parallel length of 10 mm. The reaction force is directly read out at the upper traverse through a load cell with a nominal load of 500 N. Elongations stated in this work a re evaluated from the traverse displacement. An ex-situ force-elongation cur ve based on elongations determined using Digital Image Correlation (DIC) of an identical sing le crystal is shown in Fig. B7. The tensile specimen is mounted through dovetail-shaped ends, providing form ﬁt, and additionally glued. A rendering of the load fram e, together with a close-up photo of the traverses, and a sketch of the sample are shown in Fig. A1. Fig. A1 Sketch of in situ loading frame and aluminium single crystal tensile specimen with crystal- lographic orientations. A.2 Data Treatment The collected data set is a discrete 5-dimensional ﬁeld of intensities I (x, y, z, φ, ε ). 2604.05769v1.title: ORION: Unifying Top-Down and Bottom-Up Chemical Space Sampling for a Universal Organic Force Field
2604.05769v1.summary: Empirical force fields remain the primary tool for large-scale molecular simulation, yet their limited flexibility and transferability often hinder predictive modeling in chemically complex condensed-phase systems. Here we present ORION, a universal machine-learning force field for C, H, O, N, S, and P systems developed within the Neuroevolution Potential (NEP) framework. To enhance transferability across diverse chemical environments, ORION was trained on a chemically rich dataset constructed through an integrated top-down and bottom-up strategy, enabling accurate descriptions of complex organic configurations, reactive intermediates, and weak intermolecular interactions. ORION achieves near-density-functional-theory accuracy while retaining the efficiency required for large-scale molecular dynamics simulations. On the test set, it predicts atomic forces with substantially higher accuracy than ReaxFF while running 215.5 times faster under identical hardware conditions, making simulations on the hundreds-of-nanoseconds timescale readily accessible. The model provides a balanced description of bond breaking and formation, aromatic growth, hydrogen bonding, van der Waals interactions, and π-stacking, demonstrating strong transferability across both reactive and nonreactive systems. These results establish ORION as a practical and general force field for predictive simulations in chemistry and materials science, and provide an effective route toward universal machine-learning force fields with both high accuracy and broad applicability.
2604.05769v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了传统经验力场在化学复杂凝聚相体系中灵活性和可迁移性不足的问题，特别是在预测建模方面的局限性。现有方法如ReaxFF等在处理多样化学环境时精度有限，且计算效率与精度难以平衡。该工作的创新点在于开发了基于神经进化势（NEP）框架的通用机器学习力场ORION，通过整合自上而下和自下而上的化学空间采样策略来增强可迁移性。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

ORION采用神经进化势（NEP）框架构建机器学习力场，适用于C、H、O、N、S、P六元素体系。训练数据集通过整合自上而下和自下而上策略构建，涵盖复杂有机构型、反应中间体和弱分子间相互作用。摘要未提及具体的势函数参数、边界条件设置和模拟尺寸等技术细节，需查阅全文获取。加载方式和时间步长等关键参数在摘要中未明确说明。该模型能够描述键的断裂与形成、芳香族增长、氢键、范德华相互作用和π-π堆积等多种相互作用类型。使用的具体软件平台在摘要中未提及，需查阅全文确认。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

ORION在测试集上预测原子力的精度显著高于ReaxFF，同时在相同硬件条件下运行速度快215.5倍，使得百纳秒时间尺度的模拟变得可行。该模型达到了接近密度泛函理论的精度，同时保持了大规模分子动力学模拟所需的计算效率。摘要未提供具体的应力值、温度范围或缺陷密度等定量数值，需查阅全文获取详细的精度对比数据。模型在反应性和非反应性体系中都表现出强的可迁移性。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

ORION的NEP框架和多元素体系处理能力对我的多物理耦合场模拟和分子动力学研究具有重要参考价值，特别是在处理含有C、H、O、N、S、P元素的金属有机体系时。该力场的高效率（比ReaxFF快215.5倍）使其适用于我的金属疲劳和拉伸变形的长时间尺度模拟。自上而下和自下而上的数据集构建策略可以借鉴用于我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）参数优化和验证。该模型对键断裂形成和弱相互作用的平衡描述能力，对我研究金属疲劳过程中的裂纹萌生和扩展机制具有启发意义。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了基本的方法框架和性能对比数据，但缺少训练数据集规模、具体网络架构参数、训练超参数等关键技术细节，需查阅全文获取完整的实现信息。建议重点精读方法部分了解NEP框架的具体实现、数据集构建策略章节，以及结果部分的详细精度对比和适用范围分析。

brief_cn.finding: ORION在测试集上预测原子力的精度显著高于ReaxFF，同时在相同硬件条件下运行速度快215.5倍，使得百纳秒时间尺度的模拟变得可行。该模型达到了接近密度泛函理论的精度，同时保持了大规模分子动力学模拟所需的计算效率。摘要未提供具体的应力值、温度范围或缺陷密度等定量数值，需查阅全文获取详细的精度对比数据。模型在反应性和非反应性体系中都表现出强的可迁移性。
brief_cn.meaning: ORION的NEP框架和多元素体系处理能力对我的多物理耦合场模拟和分子动力学研究具有重要参考价值，特别是在处理含有C、H、O、N、S、P元素的金属有机体系时。该力场的高效率（比ReaxFF快215.5倍）使其适用于我的金属疲劳和拉伸变形的长时间尺度模拟。自上而下和自下而上的数据集构建策略可以借鉴用于我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）参数优化和验证。该模型对键断裂形成和弱相互作用的平衡描述能力，对我研究金属疲劳过程中的裂纹萌生和扩展机制具有启发意义。

In the bottom‑up direction, representative small‑molecule structures—including those from PubChem24—were systematically perturbed via dihedral scans and coordinate displacements, and combined or extended to construct larger molecular frameworks. Additional datasets from existing literature were curated to further enrich functional group diversity and reaction coverage. This unified dual‑pathway workflow, spanning from complex condensed‑phase sys tems to fundamental reactive fragments, yields a chemically rich and systematically balanced dataset for training a transferable machine‑learning reactive potential. 2604.01642v2.title: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials for Million-Atom Simulations of Multicomponent Alloys
2604.01642v2.summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) with broad chemical flexibility are important for atomistic simulations of compositionally complex materials such as high-entropy alloys. Here, we study two state-of-the-art MLIP frameworks, the neuroevolution potential (NEP) and the graph atomic cluster expansion (GRACE), for 16 elemental metals and multicomponent alloys. GRACE potential with Finnis-Sinclair type shows substantially higher training efficiency and consistently, though only slightly, better accuracy for mechanical properties, thermal stability, and chemical extrapolation. In contrast, NEP achieves an approximately 60-fold higher inference speed, making it attractive for million-atom molecular dynamics simulations. We further examine uncertainty quantification strategies and find that ensemble-based uncertainty correlates robustly with model error, whereas D-optimality is less reliable for the systems considered here. Large-scale nonequilibrium molecular dynamics simulations of shock propagation further show that NEP, combined with ensemble-based uncertainty quantification, enables efficient and reliable simulations under extreme dynamic conditions.
2604.01642v2.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决多组分合金（如高熵合金）原子尺度模拟中机器学习势函数的化学通用性和计算效率问题。传统势函数在处理成分复杂材料时存在精度不足和适用性有限的局限性，而现有机器学习势函数在大规模模拟中面临计算效率与精度平衡的挑战。该工作的创新点在于系统比较了两种先进机器学习势函数框架在多组分合金体系中的性能表现，并结合不确定性量化策略实现了百万原子级别的可靠模拟。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用两种机器学习势函数框架：神经进化势函数（NEP）和图原子团簇展开势函数（GRACE），针对16种金属元素及其多组分合金体系进行训练和验证。GRACE势函数采用Finnis-Sinclair类型的函数形式，而NEP基于神经网络架构实现原子间相互作用的描述。摘要未提及具体的训练数据集规模、截断半径、网络层数等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。在不确定性量化方面，研究比较了集成方法和D-最优性两种策略的可靠性。大规模非平衡分子动力学模拟采用冲击波传播场景验证模型在极端动态条件下的性能，但具体的模拟盒子尺寸、原子数量、冲击速度等参数摘要中未明确给出。使用的软件平台信息在摘要中未提及，需查阅全文确认。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

GRACE势函数在训练效率方面表现显著优越，在力学性能、热稳定性和化学外推能力方面精度略高于NEP。NEP在推理速度方面实现了约60倍的性能提升，使其特别适用于百万原子级别的分子动力学模拟。集成方法的不确定性量化与模型误差呈现强相关性，而D-最优性方法在所研究体系中可靠性较低。大规模冲击波传播模拟验证了NEP结合集成不确定性量化能够在极端动态条件下实现高效可靠的模拟，但具体的精度数值和误差范围摘要中未给出。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的NEP势函数框架及其60倍推理速度提升对我的大规模金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟具有直接应用价值，特别是在处理多组分合金体系时。集成方法的不确定性量化策略可以直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟中，提高模型预测的可靠性评估。GRACE势函数的高训练效率和化学外推能力为我开发针对特定合金体系的专用势函数提供了方法参考。该工作在极端动态条件下的验证方法对我的疲劳模拟中循环加载条件的可靠性评估具有借鉴意义。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了方法框架和主要性能对比结果，但缺少训练数据集构成、网络架构参数、具体模拟设置等关键技术细节，完全复现需要查阅全文获取详细参数。建议重点精读方法部分的势函数构建细节、不确定性量化实现方案，以及大规模模拟的具体参数设置和验证结果分析章节。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: MATERIALS AND METHODS Training and test datasets The datasets used in this work consist of three compo- nents. First, the training dataset is taken from Ref. [38], which covers 16 metallic elements (Ag, Al, Au, Cr, Cu, Mg, Mo, Ni, Pb, Pd, Pt, Ta, Ti, V, W, Zr) and includes only configurations of pure metals and binary alloys. Second, we follow the testing protocol of Ref. [38], which evaluates model transferability using public mul- ticomponent datasets that extend well beyond the unary and binary training domain. In particular, Song et al. assessed force predictions on three independent datasets containing 3-component, 4-component, and even up-to- 13-component structures, and further examined forma- tion energies using ternary Materials Project structures and GNoME structures ranging from 2 to 5 components. These test data therefore provide a substantially broader benchmark for evaluating model accuracy outside the training distribution. Third, to systematically probe chemical transferabil- ity, we construct an additional benchmark dataset of multicomponent alloys covering all compositional orders from 2 to 16 elements. The dataset contains 800 struc- tures in total, spanning the 8 possible levels of compo- sitional complexity. For each order, structures are gen- erated with randomized elemental selections, concentra- tions, and atomic arrangements, with the goal of cover- ing as many distinct elemental combinations as possible rather than exhaustively enumerating the full combina- torial space. This design provides a systematic bench- mark for evaluating how model perf...

2604.05521v1.title: Development of a 3D-CNN-based Prediction Model for Migration Barriers in Plasma-Wall Interactions
2604.05521v1.summary: Understanding the long-term transport of hydrogen isotopes in plasma-facing materials, such as tungsten, is critical for the steady-state operation of magnetic confinement fusion reactors. However, dynamically updating the transition parameters for kinetic Monte Carlo (kMC) simulations as the atomic structure evolves under continuous plasma irradiation remains a severe computational bottleneck. Conventionally, calculating these migration barriers requires the iterative and computationally expensive Nudged Elastic Band (NEB) method. To overcome this limitation, this article presents a highly efficient surrogate model for predicting migration barriers using a three-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network (3D-CNN), establishing the final component necessary to realize on-the-fly molecular dynamics (MD) and kMC hybrid simulations. The proposed deep learning model takes a two-channel volumetric input, the local three-dimensional potential energy distribution and the voxelized spatial coordinates of the initial and final trapping sites, to directly output the migration barrier as a scalar value. Trained on a comprehensive dataset of tungsten-hydrogen configurations evaluated using the Embedded Atom Method (EAM) potential, the model demonstrated robust predictive accuracy, achieving a Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 0.124 eV and a high coefficient of determination of 0.890. Furthermore, utilizing GPU acceleration, the inference time is reduced to approximately 2.7 milliseconds per barrier, achieving a speed-up ratio of over 23,000 compared to conventional NEB calculations. This extraordinary acceleration effectively resolves the computational barrier of transition rate evaluations, paving the way for large-scale, dynamic modeling of plasma-wall interactions.
2604.05521v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决磁约束聚变反应器中等离子体面向材料（如钨）内氢同位素长期输运的计算瓶颈问题。在等离子体持续辐照下，动态更新动力学蒙特卡洛（kMC）模拟的迁移势垒参数成为严重的计算瓶颈，传统的推移弹性带（NEB）方法计算成本极高且迭代复杂。该工作创新性地提出基于三维卷积神经网络的代理模型来预测迁移势垒，为实现分子动力学与kMC的实时混合模拟提供了关键技术突破。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用三维卷积神经网络（3D-CNN）构建迁移势垒预测的代理模型，以嵌入原子方法（EAM）势函数为基础建立钨-氢体系的训练数据集。模型输入为双通道体积数据：局部三维势能分布和初始/最终陷阱位点的体素化空间坐标，直接输出标量形式的迁移势垒值。训练数据集涵盖钨-氢原子构型的全面配置，通过EAM势函数进行势垒计算评估。模型在GPU加速下实现推理，单个势垒预测时间约2.7毫秒。摘要未提及具体的网络架构参数、训练样本数量、体素化分辨率、边界条件设置等关键技术细节，需查阅全文获取。该方法旨在替代传统NEB计算，实现MD-kMC混合模拟的动态参数更新。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

3D-CNN模型在钨-氢体系迁移势垒预测中达到平均绝对误差（MAE）0.124 eV，决定系数R²为0.890的预测精度。相比传统NEB方法，GPU加速的推理速度提升超过23,000倍，单个势垒计算时间从传统方法缩短至约2.7毫秒。摘要未提及与实验数据的对比验证情况，也未给出模型适用的温度范围、缺陷浓度范围等具体适用条件，需查阅全文了解详细的验证结果。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的3D-CNN代理模型方法对我的多物理耦合场模拟和分子动力学研究具有重要借鉴价值，特别是在处理计算密集型参数更新问题方面。EAM势函数在钨材料体系的应用参数和0.124 eV的预测精度标准可为我的金属疲劳模拟提供参考基准。该工作展示的MD-kMC混合模拟框架思路可直接应用于我的多尺度模拟研究，通过机器学习加速关键参数计算。GPU加速实现23,000倍速度提升的技术路线对我当前的大规模分子动力学计算具有直接指导意义，特别是在处理动态边界条件和实时参数更新方面。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了关键性能指标（MAE 0.124 eV，R² 0.890）和加速比（23,000倍），但缺少网络架构细节、训练参数、数据集规模等复现必需信息。建议重点精读方法学章节了解3D-CNN架构设计和训练策略，以及结果章节中的详细验证数据和与传统方法的对比分析。

However, dynamically updating the transition parameters for kinetic Monte Carlo (kMC) simulations as the atomic structure evolves under continuous plasma irradiation remains a severe computational bottleneck. Conventionally, calculating these migration barriers requires the iterative and computationally expensive Nudged Elastic Band (NEB) method. To overcome this limitation, this article presents a highly efficient surrogate model for predicting migration barriers using a three-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network (3D-CNN), establishing the final component necessary to realize on-the-fly molecular dynamics (MD) and kMC hybrid simulations. 2604.02325v1.title: Loop-level surrogate modeling of dopant-distribution effects in Ba(Zr,Ti)O$_3$
2604.02325v1.summary: Barium titanate-based perovskites are important candidates for lead-free dielectric and electromechanical technologies. In Zr-substituted BaTiO$_3$ (BZT), functional behavior is usually discussed in terms of the average Zr concentration, while the influence of dopant spatial distribution beyond average concentration is less understood and difficult to explore systematically. Here we present an accelerated materials-design workflow that links controlled dopant distributions to full field-driven response curves. We generate a broad set of Zr distributions spanning a continuum of nanoscale arrangements, with layers, rods, dots, and lamellae serving as representative end-member motifs, and encode each configuration using a compact, parametrized descriptor model. Effective-Hamiltonian molecular dynamics is used to compute polarization-electric-field and strain-field hysteresis loops, and we train a conditional autoencoder surrogate to predict complete loops directly from the distribution parameters. This surrogate enables rapid screening and dense, property-selective design maps at scales that are not feasible with direct simulations alone, and it supports targeted follow-up simulations in regions of interest. Using the predicted loop database, we screen the distribution space for multiple functional targets, including energy-storage performance, electromechanical response, and switching behavior, and identify the corresponding dopant distribution motif families. The resulting design maps show that dopant distribution is an independent tuning parameter that can strongly affect hysteresis behavior and loop-derived figures of merit: layer-like motifs, vertical lamellae, and nanoplate-like inclusions emerge in different performance regimes. More generally, predicting full response curves enables screening of other loop-derived targets and multi-objective design in substituted ferroelectrics.
2604.02325v1.summary_text:
## 技术分析报告

### 1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了钛酸钡基钙钛矿材料中掺杂剂空间分布对电介质和机电性能影响的定量预测问题，这是无铅压电材料设计的关键科学问题。现有研究主要关注平均Zr浓度对BaTiO₃性能的影响，而忽略了掺杂剂空间分布这一重要因素，缺乏系统性的分布-性能关系研究方法。该工作创新性地建立了从受控掺杂分布到完整场驱动响应曲线的加速材料设计工作流程，突破了传统平均浓度描述的局限性。

### 2) 核心方法与模型细节

采用有效哈密顿量分子动力学（Effective-Hamiltonian MD）方法计算极化-电场和应变-场滞回曲线，这是专门针对铁电材料开发的多尺度模拟方法。建立了参数化描述符模型来编码各种Zr分布构型，包括层状、棒状、点状和片层状等代表性端元基序。使用条件自编码器（conditional autoencoder）作为代理模型，直接从分布参数预测完整的滞回曲线，实现了从微观分布到宏观响应的快速映射。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。边界条件和加载方式涉及电场驱动的极化和应变响应测试，但具体设置参数摘要中未详述。使用的软件平台在摘要中未明确提及，需查阅全文确认。

### 3) 关键结果与定量结论

建立了涵盖从层状、垂直片层到纳米板状夹杂物等不同性能区域的设计图谱，实现了多功能目标的筛选包括储能性能、机电响应和开关行为。研究发现掺杂剂分布是独立的调控参数，能够强烈影响滞回行为和回路衍生的品质因数。摘要未提供具体的应力值、温度范围或缺陷密度等定量数值，需查阅全文获取详细数据。代理模型能够在直接模拟无法达到的尺度上实现快速筛选和密集的性能选择性设计图谱生成。

### 4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的参数化描述符模型方法可直接应用于我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）中描述缺陷和杂质的空间分布特征。条件自编码器代理模型的构建思路对我的多物理耦合场模拟具有重要启发，可用于加速大规模参数空间的探索和优化。从微观分布到宏观响应曲线的映射方法论可借鉴到金属疲劳模拟中，用于建立微观组织特征与疲劳性能的定量关系。该工作展示的多目标设计策略对我当前的拉伸变形模拟工作具有方法论指导意义，特别是在材料性能优化和设计空间探索方面。

### 5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了方法框架和主要思路，但缺少关键的模拟参数细节如原子数、时间步长、电场强度范围、温度条件等，需查阅全文获取完整的参数设置。建议重点精读方法部分的有效哈密顿量MD设置、参数化描述符模型构建细节，以及代理模型的训练和验证过程章节。

brief_cn.method: 采用有效哈密顿量分子动力学（Effective-Hamiltonian MD）方法计算极化-电场和应变-场滞回曲线，这是专门针对铁电材料开发的多尺度模拟方法。建立了参数化描述符模型来编码各种Zr分布构型，包括层状、棒状、点状和片层状等代表性端元基序。使用条件自编码器（conditional autoencoder）作为代理模型，直接从分布参数预测完整的滞回曲线，实现了从微观分布到宏观响应的快速映射。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。边界条件和加载方式涉及电场驱动的极化和应变响应测试，但具体设置参数摘要中未详述。使用的软件平台在摘要中未明确提及，需查阅全文确认。 ### 3) 关键结果与定量结论 建立了涵盖从层状、垂直片层到纳米板状夹杂物等不同性能区域的设计图谱，实现了多功能目标的筛选包括储能性能、机电响应和开关行为。研究发现掺杂剂分布是独立的调控参数，能够强烈影响滞回行为和回路衍生的品质因数。摘要未提供具体的应力值、温度范围或缺陷密度等定量数值，需查阅全文获取详细数据。代理模型能够在直接模拟无法达到的尺度上实现快速筛选和密集的性能选择性设计图谱生成。 ### 4) 对我研究的直接价值 该论文的参数化描述符模型方法可直接应用于我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）中描述缺陷和杂质的空间分布特征。条件自编码器代理模型的构建思路对我的多物理耦合场模拟具有重要启发，可用于加速大规模参数空间的探索和优化。从微观分布到宏观响应曲线的映射方法论可借鉴到金属疲劳模拟中，用于建立微观组织特征与疲劳性能的定量关系。该工作展示的多目标设计策略对我当前的拉伸变形模拟工作具有方法论指导意义，特别是在材料性能优化和设计空间探索方面。 ### 5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议 摘要提供了方法框架和主要思路，但缺少关键的模拟参数细节如原子数、时间步长、电场强度范围、温度条件等，...

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: 2 Methodology In this section, we introduce the simulation and modeling framework used to generate and analyze Zr-substituted BaTiO3 supercells. We first describe the effective- Hamiltonian molecular-dynamics approach used to com- pute P–E and S–E responses. We then introduce the parametrized model used to generate controlled spatial distributions of Zr within the supercells, followed by a description of the dataset construction and the extraction of key functional quantities. Together, these components 2 form the basis for the machine-learning framework devel- oped in the subsequent section.

2604.01858v1.title: Elastic softening and fracture in randomly perforated solids
2604.01858v1.summary: We study the mechanical response of quasi-brittle polymethyl methacrylate (PMMA) specimens containing controlled random distributions of laser-cut holes. Tensile tests combined with digital image correlation reveal a nearly linear decrease of the Young's modulus with porosity, but with a softening rate far exceeding classical effective medium theory and the Hashin-Shtrikman bound. The extrapolated critical porosity at which the modulus vanishes is well below the 2D percolation threshold, indicating that ideal cylindrical void models fail to capture the observed behavior. Microscopy shows irregular pore geometries and frequent coalescence, which effectively act as crack-like defects and strongly enhance compliance. The rupture stress distributions are well described by a Weibull model accounting for both load-bearing area reduction and stress concentration at hole edges. Digital image correlation reveals heterogeneous but non-localized deformation, with strain increasingly correlated with the hole pattern, indicating a growing influence of defect-induced stress concentrations. These results highlight the dominant role of defect morphology in governing stiffness degradation and fracture statistics in porous quasi-brittle materials.
2604.01858v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文研究随机多孔聚甲基丙烯酸甲酯（PMMA）材料在拉伸载荷下的弹性软化和断裂行为，针对准脆性多孔材料的力学响应预测问题。现有的经典有效介质理论和Hashin-Shtrikman边界模型无法准确预测多孔材料的弹性模量退化，特别是当孔隙形态不规则且存在孔隙聚结现象时。该工作的创新点在于结合激光切割制备受控随机孔隙分布试样、数字图像相关技术和显微观察，揭示了孔隙形态对材料刚度退化的主导作用。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用实验-理论结合的方法，使用激光切割技术在PMMA试样中制备受控的随机孔隙分布。摘要未提及具体的模拟方法，但采用了数字图像相关（DIC）技术进行应变场测量和分析。理论框架基于经典有效介质理论、Hashin-Shtrikman边界理论以及二维渗流理论进行对比分析。断裂统计分析采用Weibull模型，该模型考虑了承载面积减少和孔边应力集中两个因素。加载方式为单轴拉伸试验，摘要未提及具体的应变率和试样尺寸参数。显微镜观察用于表征孔隙的实际几何形态和聚结行为。摘要未提及使用的具体软件平台和数值模拟细节。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现杨氏模量随孔隙率呈近似线性下降，但软化速率远超经典有效介质理论和Hashin-Shtrikman边界的预测值。外推得到的临界孔隙率（模量为零时）远低于二维渗流阈值，表明理想圆柱孔隙模型无法捕捉实际行为。显微观察显示孔隙几何形状不规则且频繁聚结，这些缺陷表现为类裂纹行为并显著增强材料柔度。断裂应力分布很好地符合考虑承载面积减少和孔边应力集中的Weibull模型。DIC测量显示应变场与孔隙分布模式的相关性逐渐增强，表明缺陷诱导的应力集中影响不断增大。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的Weibull统计断裂模型可以直接应用于我的金属疲劳模拟中，特别是在处理含缺陷材料的疲劳寿命预测时。孔隙聚结导致的类裂纹行为机制对我的拉伸变形模拟具有重要启发，可以在分子动力学模拟中重点关注缺陷聚结过程及其对应力集中的影响。该研究揭示的应变场与缺陷分布相关性增强的现象，可以为我的多物理耦合场模拟中的应变局域化建模提供验证基准。在相场晶体模型（XPFC）中，可以借鉴其缺陷形态对弹性性能影响的定量关系来改进缺陷演化的本构模型。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

brief_cn.what_done: 该论文研究随机多孔聚甲基丙烯酸甲酯（PMMA）材料在拉伸载荷下的弹性软化和断裂行为，针对准脆性多孔材料的力学响应预测问题。现有的经典有效介质理论和Hashin-Shtrikman边界模型无法准确预测多孔材料的弹性模量退化，特别是当孔隙形态不规则且存在孔隙聚结现象时。该工作的创新点在于结合激光切割制备受控随机孔隙分布试样、数字图像相关技术和显微观察，揭示了孔隙形态对材料刚度退化的主导作用。
brief_cn.method: 该研究采用实验-理论结合的方法，使用激光切割技术在PMMA试样中制备受控的随机孔隙分布。摘要未提及具体的模拟方法，但采用了数字图像相关（DIC）技术进行应变场测量和分析。理论框架基于经典有效介质理论、Hashin-Shtrikman边界理论以及二维渗流理论进行对比分析。断裂统计分析采用Weibull模型，该模型考虑了承载面积减少和孔边应力集中两个因素。加载方式为单轴拉伸试验，摘要未提及具体的应变率和试样尺寸参数。显微镜观察用于表征孔隙的实际几何形态和聚结行为。摘要未提及使用的具体软件平台和数值模拟细节。
brief_cn.finding: 研究发现杨氏模量随孔隙率呈近似线性下降，但软化速率远超经典有效介质理论和Hashin-Shtrikman边界的预测值。外推得到的临界孔隙率（模量为零时）远低于二维渗流阈值，表明理想圆柱孔隙模型无法捕捉实际行为。显微观察显示孔隙几何形状不规则且频繁聚结，这些缺陷表现为类裂纹行为并显著增强材料柔度。断裂应力分布很好地符合考虑承载面积减少和孔边应力集中的Weibull模型。DIC测量显示应变场与孔隙分布模式的相关性逐渐增强，表明缺陷诱导的应力集中影响不断增大。

2603.07352v1.title: Microstructural origins of energy storage during plastic deformation of 310S TWIP steel
2603.07352v1.summary: The microstructural mechanisms governing energy storage during plastic deformation of twinning-induced plasticity (TWIP) steels remain insufficiently understood, particularly under conditions of strain localization. This study provides a crystallographic-scale interpretation of energy storage in 310S TWIP steel exhibiting complex deformation mechanisms. Electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) was used to characterize the evolution of local crystallographic orientation and microtexture during uniaxial tensile deformation using two complementary approaches: tracking the same surface region at successive strain levels and analysing regions corresponding to known local plastic strain. Deformation was initially dominated by dislocation slip, while twinning activity increased significantly beyond an equivalent plastic strain of approximately 0.3. Progressive deformation produced pronounced lattice rotations and the development of a dual-fibre texture consisting of a dominant 111 parallel to RD component and a secondary 100 parallel to RD component associated with deformation twinning. Correlation with previously quantified energy storage behaviour obtained from coupled digital image correlation and infrared thermography measurements reveals that intensified twinning and texture evolution in strain-localized regions are accompanied by a marked reduction in the energy storage rate. The results indicate that twin-matrix refinement and lattice rotation progressively reduce the material's capacity to store deformation energy and create favourable conditions for shear-band-mediated deformation.
2603.07352v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决TWIP钢（孪晶诱导塑性钢）在塑性变形过程中能量存储的微观机制问题，特别是在应变局部化条件下的机制理解不足。现有研究对TWIP钢复杂变形机制下的晶体学尺度能量存储行为缺乏深入认识，特别是孪晶形成与能量存储率之间的定量关系。该工作创新点在于结合EBSD晶体学表征与红外热成像-数字图像相关技术，建立了微观组织演化与宏观能量存储行为的直接关联。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用实验表征方法而非数值模拟，主要使用电子背散射衍射（EBSD）技术进行晶体学表征。实验采用单轴拉伸加载方式对310S TWIP钢进行变形，通过两种互补方法追踪微观组织演化：连续应变水平下同一表面区域的跟踪分析和已知局部塑性应变区域的对比分析。关键实验参数包括等效塑性应变达到约0.3时孪晶活动显著增加的临界点。实验结合了数字图像相关（DIC）技术和红外热成像技术来定量测量能量存储行为。摘要未提及具体的应变率、温度条件、试样尺寸等关键实验参数，需查阅全文获取。使用的软件平台和数据处理方法在摘要中未明确说明。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现变形初期以位错滑移为主导机制，当等效塑性应变超过约0.3时孪晶活动显著增强。渐进变形产生明显的晶格转动并形成双纤维织构，包括主要的<111>平行于轧制方向（RD）组分和与变形孪晶相关的次要<100>平行于RD组分。关键发现是应变局部化区域中孪晶强化和织构演化伴随着能量存储率的显著降低。结果表明孪晶-基体细化和晶格转动逐步降低了材料存储变形能量的能力，为剪切带介导的变形创造了有利条件。摘要未提供具体的应力数值、能量存储率的定量数据等，需查阅全文。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文对多物理耦合场模拟具有重要参考价值，特别是在建立微观变形机制与宏观能量耗散行为的耦合模型方面。等效塑性应变0.3作为孪晶活动显著增强的临界值可作为相场晶体模型中相变临界参数的参考。双纤维织构演化规律可为XPFC模型中晶体取向演化的验证提供实验基准。能量存储率与微观组织演化的关联机制对金属疲劳模拟中能量耗散模型的构建具有直接指导意义。该研究揭示的孪晶-基体细化对变形能力的影响机制可用于优化拉伸变形模拟中的硬化模型参数。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

论文摘要缺少关键实验参数如应变率、温度、试样几何尺寸、EBSD扫描参数等详细信息，需查阅全文获取完整的实验条件。建议重点精读实验方法部分以获取详细的EBSD表征参数和DIC-红外热成像耦合测量的技术细节，以及结果讨论部分中能量存储率与微观组织演化定量关系的分析。

2604.12730v1.title: Stress field modification near linear complexions increases the effective obstacle size and strengthening effect
2604.12730v1.summary: Linear complexions are stable defect states that form along dislocations and recent experiments have demonstrated strengthening effects exceeding classical precipitation hardening predictions, motivating a detailed study of nanoscale strengthening mechanisms. Here, molecular dynamics simulations in Al-Cu and Ni-Al face-centered cubic alloys are used to demonstrate distinct plasticity mechanisms associated with linear complexions. Both nanoparticle array and platelet array complexions exhibit appreciable strengthening. In addition to direct interactions with the particles, stress field modification in nearby regions can restrict dislocation motion as well. Finally, the relative particle-dislocation orientation is found to have a large effect, with the strongest resistance observed when the dislocation stress field aligns with the original complexion nucleation condition. As a whole, these findings provide mechanistic insight into the strengthening observed experimentally and establish design principles for linear complexion-induced strengthening in structural alloys.
2604.12730v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景
- 该论文围绕「Stress field modification near linear complexions increases the effective obstacle size and strengthening effect」展开，针对Molecular Dynamics相关问题进行建模与分析。
- 主题归类: Molecular Dynamics

2) 核心方法与模型细节
- 检测到的方法信号: 原子尺度分子动力学模拟；位错演化分析
- 模型类别: 分子动力学（MD）
- 摘要中提取的参数线索: 摘要中未找到具体数值参数，需查阅全文 Methods 章节。

3) 关键结果
- 结果提供了原子尺度机理解释，可辅助参数选型和机理验证。

4) 对你研究的意义
- 可用于完善你分子动力学参数设定、势函数选择和微观机理解释。

5) 可复现性与阅读建议

- 如有实验对比数据，注意验证方法和误差范围。

6) 摘要原文
- Linear complexions are stable defect states that form along dislocations and recent experiments have demonstrated strengthening effects exceeding classical precipitation hardening predictions, motivating a detailed study of nanoscale strengthening mechanisms. Here, molecular dynamics simulations in Al-Cu and Ni-Al face-centered cubic alloys are used to demonstrate distinct plasticity mechanisms associated with linear complexions. Both nanoparticle array and platelet array complexions exhibit appreciable strengthening. In addition to direct interactions with the particles, stress field modification in nearby regions can restrict dislocation motion as well. Finally, the relative particle-dislocation orientation is found to have a large effect, with the strongest resistance observed when the dislocation stress field aligns with the original complexion nucleation condition. As a whole, these findings provide mechanistic insight into the strengthening observed experimentally and establish design principles for linear complexion-induced strengthening in structural alloys.

For both Al–Cu and Ni-Al system, LC samples were generated following a previously established hybrid Monte Carlo/molecular dynamics (MC/MD) protocol [29], with a time step of 1 fs for MD and one MC step performed for every 100 MD time steps. The equilibrated LC s were obtained using a Nose –Hoover thermostat and barostat at a constant temperature (250 K for Al-Cu and 300 K for Ni-Al) and zero external pressure with an initial pair of edge dislocations first relaxed to Shockley partials, with periodic boundary condition applied in all directions. Well-established embedded atom method potentials were used for Al-Cu [29] and Ni-Al [30] that are able to reproduce the phase diagrams of these alloy systems. 2603.20986v1.title: AutoMOOSE: An Agentic AI for Autonomous Phase-Field Simulation
2603.20986v1.summary: Multiphysics simulation frameworks such as MOOSE provide rigorous engines for phase-field materials modeling, yet adoption is constrained by the expertise required to construct valid input files, coordinate parameter sweeps, diagnose failures, and extract quantitative results. We introduce AutoMOOSE, an open-source agentic framework that orchestrates the full simulation lifecycle from a single natural-language prompt. AutoMOOSE deploys a five-agent pipeline in which the Input Writer coordinates six sub-agents and the Reviewer autonomously corrects runtime failures without user intervention. A modular plugin architecture enables new phase-field formulations without modifying the core framework, and a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server exposes the workflow as ten structured tools for interoperability with any MCP-compatible client. Validated on a four-temperature copper grain growth benchmark, AutoMOOSE generates MOOSE input files with 6 of 12 structural blocks matching a human expert reference exactly and 4 functionally equivalent, executes all runs in parallel with a 1.8x speedup, and performs an end-to-end physical consistency check spanning intent, finite-element execution, and Arrhenius kinetics with no human verification. Grain coarsening kinetics are recovered with R^2 = 0.90-0.95 at T >= 600 K; the recovered activation energy Q_fit = 0.296 eV is consistent with a human-written reference (Q_fit = 0.267 eV) under identical parameters. Three runtime failure classes were diagnosed and resolved autonomously within a single correction cycle, and every run produces a provenance record satisfying FAIR data principles. These results show that the gap between knowing the physics and executing a validated simulation campaign can be bridged by a lightweight multi-agent orchestration layer, providing a pathway toward AI-driven materials discovery and self-driving laboratories.
2603.20986v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了相场模拟中专业门槛过高的问题，特别是MOOSE框架需要用户具备构建输入文件、参数扫描、故障诊断和结果提取的专业知识。现有相场模拟框架虽然提供了严格的计算引擎，但其复杂的操作流程限制了广泛应用。该工作的创新点在于开发了一个基于多智能体的自主化相场模拟框架，能够从单一自然语言提示完成整个模拟生命周期。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

AutoMOOSE采用五智能体管道架构，其中Input Writer协调六个子智能体，Reviewer自主纠正运行时故障。框架基于MOOSE相场模拟引擎，使用模块化插件架构支持新的相场公式而无需修改核心框架。系统通过Model Context Protocol (MCP)服务器暴露十个结构化工具，实现与任何MCP兼容客户端的互操作性。在铜晶粒长大基准测试中，模拟涵盖四个温度条件，采用并行执行方式实现1.8倍加速。摘要未提及具体的网格规模、时间步长、边界条件设置等关键模拟参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。系统能够自主生成MOOSE输入文件，其中12个结构块中有6个与专家参考完全匹配，4个功能等效。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

在T >= 600 K温度范围内，晶粒粗化动力学恢复的拟合优度达到R² = 0.90-0.95。系统恢复的激活能Q_fit = 0.296 eV，与相同参数下人工编写参考的Q_fit = 0.267 eV保持一致。AutoMOOSE在单个修正周期内自主诊断并解决了三类运行时故障，实现了从意图到有限元执行再到Arrhenius动力学的端到端物理一致性检查。每次运行都产生满足FAIR数据原则的溯源记录，无需人工验证。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该框架的多智能体架构和自动化故障诊断机制可以直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟工作，特别是在XPFC模型的参数优化和批量计算中。AutoMOOSE的并行执行策略和1.8倍加速效果对我的金属疲劳模拟中的大规模参数扫描具有重要参考价值。系统的端到端物理一致性检查方法可以借鉴到我的拉伸变形模拟中，用于验证模拟结果的物理合理性。模块化插件架构的设计思路可以应用于我的多尺度模拟框架开发，实现不同物理模型的灵活集成。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

论文提供了关键性能指标和验证结果，但缺少具体的网格参数、时间步长、边界条件等模拟细节，需查阅全文获取完整的技术实现信息。建议重点精读智能体架构设计、故障诊断机制和物理一致性检查方法相关章节，这些内容对构建自动化模拟框架具有直接指导意义。

These results demonstrate that the gap between knowing the physics and executing a validated simulation campaign can now be bridged by a lightweight multi-agent orchestration layer, providing a quantitatively verified pathway toward AI-driven materials discovery and self-driving computational laboratories. Keywords:agentic AI · multiphysics simulation · large language models · phase-field modelling · materials discovery 1 Introduction Microstructure governs the properties of structural and functional materials: for example, grain size controls yield strength and creep resistance in metallic alloys, domain topology determines the switching efficiency of ferroelectrics, and precipitate morphology sets the coarsening kinetics of superalloys [1–3]. Because microstructure emerges from processing history, predicting its evolution is central to materials discovery and design. Phase-field methods pro- vide precisely this capability — a thermodynamically consistent framework for modeling grain growth, spinodal arXiv:2603.20986v1 [cs.AI] 22 Mar 2026 decomposition, solidification, and ferroelectric domain dynamics — and have become the dominant approach to mesoscale microstructure simulation [4, 5]. Among the platforms that have made these methods accessible at scale, the Multiphysics Object-Oriented Simulation Environment (MOOSE) stands out for its modular finite-element architecture, scalability from workstations to leadership-class HPC systems, and a broad, active community of materials scientists and engineers [6, 7]. Despite its power, the practical adoption of phase-fie...

2603.23351v1.title: Physics-Informed AI for Laser-Enhanced Contact Optimization in Silicon PV: Electrothermal Activation, Degradation Regimes, and Process Control
2603.23351v1.summary: Laser-enhanced contact optimization (LECO) is increasingly used method to reduce contact resistance and recover fill factor in advanced crystalline silicon solar cells. However, the industrial transferability is limited because the same localized activation that improves carrier transport can also create kinetically unstable interface states. LECO can be viewed as a coupled Multiphysics process that links microstructural evidence to device-level signature that uses instantaneous regime map together with a reliability classification based on time-dependent drift. Thus, a predictive workflow is outlined in the review that couples (i) transient electrothermal modeling to reduced state metrics, (ii) effective diffusion depth and local areal energy density, and (iii) propagated calibrated thresholds across recipe space. The framework separates stable optimization from marginal activation and latent damage and explains why fine-line scaling and copper-containing stacks tighten stability margins through current localization and diffusion-barrier constraints. It sum up the next generation AI guided optimization digital twin.
2603.23351v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决硅太阳能电池中激光增强接触优化（LECO）工艺的稳定性控制问题，旨在降低接触电阻并恢复填充因子。现有LECO方法虽能改善载流子传输，但同时会产生动力学不稳定的界面态，限制了工业化应用。该工作的创新点在于建立了多物理耦合预测框架，将微观结构证据与器件级特征关联，通过瞬态政权图和基于时间漂移的可靠性分类实现工艺稳定性预测。论文提出了下一代AI引导的优化数字孪生概念。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用多物理耦合建模方法，核心框架包含三个关键组件：瞬态电热建模、有效扩散深度计算和局部面能量密度分析。摘要未提及具体的控制方程或理论框架，需查阅全文获取详细信息。模拟涉及电热耦合过程，考虑了电流局域化和扩散阻挡层约束对细线缩放和含铜堆叠结构稳定性边界的影响。该方法建立了校准阈值在配方空间的传播机制，用于区分稳定优化、边际激活和潜在损伤三种状态。摘要未提及具体的软件平台、模拟尺寸、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文确认。预测工作流程整合了状态度量简化、扩散深度计算和能量密度分析。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

论文建立了基于瞬态政权图的LECO工艺稳定性分类方法，能够区分稳定优化区域与边际激活和潜在损伤区域。研究揭示了细线缩放和含铜堆叠结构通过电流局域化和扩散阻挡约束收紧稳定性边界的机制。摘要未提及具体的数值结果，如接触电阻降低幅度、临界能量密度阈值、扩散深度范围等定量参数，需查阅全文获取。该框架实现了微观结构变化与器件性能之间的定量关联，为工业化LECO工艺提供了预测性指导。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多物理耦合建模框架对我的研究具有重要参考价值，特别是电热耦合模拟方法可直接应用于金属疲劳和拉伸变形中的温度效应分析。瞬态政权图概念可借鉴用于建立金属材料在循环加载下的损伤演化分类体系。基于时间依赖漂移的可靠性评估方法可用于预测金属疲劳寿命和变形稳定性。该研究中将微观结构证据与宏观性能关联的思路，对于我在XPFC模型中连接原子尺度缺陷与宏观力学性能具有直接启发意义。AI引导的优化数字孪生概念为我的多尺度模拟工作提供了新的发展方向。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供的参数细节有限，缺少具体的模拟参数、材料属性、边界条件设置等关键信息，需查阅全文获取完整的建模细节。建议重点精读方法学部分以了解多物理耦合框架的具体实现，以及结果部分中政权图构建和稳定性分类的定量标准。

brief_cn.method: 该研究采用多物理耦合建模方法，核心框架包含三个关键组件：瞬态电热建模、有效扩散深度计算和局部面能量密度分析。摘要未提及具体的控制方程或理论框架，需查阅全文获取详细信息。模拟涉及电热耦合过程，考虑了电流局域化和扩散阻挡层约束对细线缩放和含铜堆叠结构稳定性边界的影响。该方法建立了校准阈值在配方空间的传播机制，用于区分稳定优化、边际激活和潜在损伤三种状态。摘要未提及具体的软件平台、模拟尺寸、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文确认。预测工作流程整合了状态度量简化、扩散深度计算和能量密度分析。
brief_cn.finding: 论文建立了基于瞬态政权图的LECO工艺稳定性分类方法，能够区分稳定优化区域与边际激活和潜在损伤区域。研究揭示了细线缩放和含铜堆叠结构通过电流局域化和扩散阻挡约束收紧稳定性边界的机制。摘要未提及具体的数值结果，如接触电阻降低幅度、临界能量密度阈值、扩散深度范围等定量参数，需查阅全文获取。该框架实现了微观结构变化与器件性能之间的定量关联，为工业化LECO工艺提供了预测性指导。
brief_cn.meaning: 该论文的多物理耦合建模框架对我的研究具有重要参考价值，特别是电热耦合模拟方法可直接应用于金属疲劳和拉伸变形中的温度效应分析。瞬态政权图概念可借鉴用于建立金属材料在循环加载下的损伤演化分类体系。基于时间依赖漂移的可靠性评估方法可用于预测金属疲劳寿命和变形稳定性。该研究中将微观结构证据与宏观性能关联的思路，对于我在XPFC模型中连接原子尺度缺陷与宏观力学性能具有直接启发意义。AI引导的优化数字孪生概念为我的多尺度模拟工作提供了新的发展方向。

Ebong) Abstract: Laser-enhanced contact optimization (LECO) is increasingly used method to reduce contact resistance and recover fill factor in advanced crystalline silicon solar cells. However, the industrial transferability is limited because the same localized activation that improves carrier transport can also create kinetically unstable interface states. LECO can be viewed as a coupled Multiphysics process that links microstructural evidence to device-level signature that uses instantaneous regime map together with a reliability classification based on time-dependent drift. Thus, a predictive workflow is outlined in the review that couples (i) transient electrothermal modeling to reduced state metrics, (ii) effective diffusion depth and local areal energy density, and (iii) propagated calibrated thresholds across recipe space. 2604.11706v1.title: Effect of Pre-Shear and Dispersity on Crystallization of a Model Polymer with Soft Pair Interactions using Molecular Dynamics Simulations
2604.11706v1.summary: Polymer crystallization is a process of great interest in both fundamental theory and industrial settings, particularly in polymer processing and applications involving semi-crystalline materials. The effect of processing on the initial stages of crystallization is not fully understood. Our study investigates the influence of pre-shear on monodisperse melts and bidisperse blends of a generic, segmentally coarse-grained polymer model. Through molecular dynamics simulations, we explore how polydispersity affects crystallization, where we found that the addition of short chains to a melt of longer chains increased the final crystallinity by about 10%, and increased the initial growth rate by roughly a factor of two. In contrast, however, pre-shearing the hot melt before quenching only showed a minor increase in both growth rates and final crystallinty, except in monodisperse melts of short chains. Crystal grain shapes were most influenced by pre-shearing monodisperse melts, where both asphericity and prolateness decreased. Additionally, we determined topological connectivity of crystal grains through tie- and loop-chain analysis. Again, only monodisperse melts showed a significant increase of tie chain fractions with pre-shear, while all other systems showed only modest increases. Our findings provide insight into the changes of crystallinity and cluster morphologies that emerge when pre-sheared, offering a deeper understanding of the initial crystallization processes in polymer melts when subjected to pre-shear.

2604.11370v1.title: Ru Alloying in Ni/Al Reactive Multilayers: Experimental Observations and Molecular Dynamics Simulations
2604.11370v1.summary: Reactive multilayer thin films, a class of energetic materials, are increasingly recognized for their potential in joining applications, utilizing the chemical energy released as heat during exothermic reactions. These materials hold also promise for additional diverse technological applications, which require precise control over heat release rates and reaction propagation velocities. The microstructural properties of reactive multilayers play a critical role in determining their chemical reaction behavior. Among these, Ni/Al reactive multilayers have been extensively studied and used due to their favorable characteristics. In this study, we explore the incorporation of ruthenium (Ru) as a co-alloying element with nickel (Ni) in the Ni/Al system to investigate its impact on the materials properties, with a particular focus on reaction velocity and temperature. Ru enhances the reaction rates, but also causes a composition dependent phase transition in the as-deposited state from fcc to hcp. Additionally, molecular dynamics simulations are employed to examine the effects of Ru co-alloying with Ni, providing deeper insights into the underlying mechanisms. This work aims to advance the understanding of Ru's role in influencing the performance of Al/Ni-based reactive multilayers for advanced applications.

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: cent material, creating a self-sustaining reaction front. This front advances through the multilayer structure at specific temperatures and velocities3–5. Recently, the integration of reactive multilayer systems into microelectronics and micromechanical systems (MEMS) as a bonding technique has gained considerable momentum, draw- ing increased attention from the scientific community6,7. The reaction characteristics of Ni/Al reactive multilayer systems (RMS) have been widely studied due to their rapid heat release during self-propagating reactions. Key parameters such as maximum temperature and propagation velocity can be con- trolled by adjusting the bilayer thickness or modifying the de- gree of intermixing within the system8–11. However, modifying these parameters requires intricate ad- justments to the fabrication process. Consequently, numerous studies have focused on developing new methodologies to reg- ulate the heat release rate during the reaction. A wide variety of binary systems has been investigated, including aluminides such as Al/Pt 10, Al/Ni 12, Al/Ru 13, and Al/Ti 14, as well as other combinations such as Ni/Ti 15,16 and Nb/Si 17. Studies have demonstrated that incorporating alloying elements into multilayers can either increase or decrease reaction propaga- tion velocities18. Ni/Al multilayers were alloyed by substitut- ing nickel with elements such as copper and platinum, signif- icantly altering reaction front temperature and velocity. This approach enables controlled or rapid heat release for various engineering applications without changing the multil...

2604.03783v1.title: Structurally Triggered Breakdown of the Phonon Gas Model in Crystalline Metal-Organic Frameworks
2604.03783v1.summary: While crystalline materials with glass-like thermal conductivity are fundamentally intriguing, structurally triggering the transition from propagating to diffusive heat transport within a single framework remains a formidable challenge. Here, using extensive machine learning molecular dynamics, we demonstrate a fundamental thermal transport crossover in metal-organic frameworks. We reveal that grafting flexible side chains onto a pristine MOF backbone acts as a structural switch, strongly reducing the thermal conductivity by $\sim$70% (from $\sim 0.7$ to $\sim 0.2\ \text{W m}^{-1}\text{K}^{-1}$ at 300 K). Crucially, the functionalized derivatives exhibit a drastic transition from a classical Peierls $\sim 1/T$ decay to an anomalous, temperature-independent glass-like plateau. Reciprocal- and real-space analyses reveal the microscopic origins: the side chains act as built-in local resonators that trap acoustic energy via strong low-frequency resonant hybridization, while simultaneously inducing extreme steric crowding. Consequently, the heat-carrying phonon modes become critically damped, with their mean free paths strictly confined to the nanometer scale and their lifetimes collapsing to the Ioffe-Regel limit. This work establishes a highly programmable molecular engineering strategy to dismantle the phonon gas model, forcing crystalline frameworks into an extreme diffusive transport regime.

1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了如何在单一晶体框架内实现从传播性到扩散性热传输转变的科学问题，这在具有玻璃态热导率的晶体材料研究中具有重要意义。现有方法难以通过结构调控在保持晶体结构的同时实现热传输机制的根本性转变。该工作的创新点在于通过在金属有机框架(MOF)主链上接枝柔性侧链来实现结构触发的热传输机制转换，突破了传统声子气体模型的适用范围。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用了大规模机器学习分子动力学(ML-MD)方法进行热传输模拟。摘要未提及具体的势函数类型和版本，需查阅全文获取详细信息。模拟在300K温度条件下进行，通过对比原始MOF和功能化衍生物的热导率来研究结构对热传输的影响。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文。研究采用了倒格空间和实空间分析方法来揭示微观机理，重点分析了声学能量的共振杂化和空间位阻效应。摘要未提及使用的具体软件平台，需查阅全文确认。边界条件设置和加载方式的具体细节在摘要中未提及。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现接枝柔性侧链后MOF的热导率从约0.7 W m⁻¹K⁻¹显著降低约70%至约0.2 W m⁻¹K⁻¹(300K条件下)。功能化衍生物表现出从经典Peierls ~1/T衰减到异常的温度无关玻璃态平台的剧烈转变。侧链作为内置局域共振器通过强低频共振杂化捕获声学能量，同时诱导极端空间拥挤效应。载热声子模式变为临界阻尼状态，平均自由程被严格限制在纳米尺度，寿命降至Ioffe-Regel极限。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的结构调控策略对我的多物理耦合场模拟和金属疲劳模拟研究具有重要启发，特别是在理解结构缺陷对材料性能影响方面。机器学习分子动力学方法可以直接应用于我的MD模拟工作中，提高计算效率和精度。热传输机制从传播性到扩散性的转变机理可以为我的相场晶体模型(XPFC)中缺陷演化和性能预测提供理论基础。温度相关的热导率变化规律(从~1/T到平台)可以作为我在拉伸变形模拟中考虑温度效应的重要参考。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了关键的热导率数值和温度条件，但缺少势函数类型、模拟参数、软件平台等关键技术细节，需查阅全文获取完整的计算设置。建议重点精读方法学部分了解ML-MD的具体实现，以及结果分析部分的倒格空间和实空间分析方法，这些对理解结构-性能关系的微观机理至关重要。

2604.08058v1.title: Machine Learning the order-disorder Jahn-Teller transition in LaMnO$_3$
2604.08058v1.summary: We investigate the Jahn-Teller structural phase transition in LaMnO$_3$ at $T_{JT} \simeq 750$ K using molecular dynamics simulations based on machine-learning force fields trained on ab initio data. Analysis of the site-site correlation function of the distortions reveals that the transition is driven by the ordering of the $Q_2$ Jahn-Teller distortion of the MnO$_6$ octahedra, which acts as the order parameter and establishes the order-disorder nature of the transition. Dynamical local distortions are found to persist above $T_{JT}$. Our results reproduce the experimental temperature dependence of both structural and phonon properties and highlight the presence of anharmonic effects at finite temperature. More broadly, the combined use of machine-learning molecular dynamics and velocity autocorrelation function analysis provides a robust framework for uncovering the microscopic mechanisms of structural phase transitions in correlated materials. In particular, this approach enables a clear distinction between order-disorder transitions and alternative mechanisms, such as displacive behavior, through the temperature evolution of vibrational properties.
2604.08058v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了LaMnO₃中Jahn-Teller结构相变的微观机制问题，特别是在750K附近发生的有序-无序相变的本质。现有的实验和理论研究无法清晰区分该相变是有序-无序型还是位移型机制，缺乏对MnO₆八面体畸变动力学行为的深入理解。该工作的创新点在于结合机器学习分子动力学和速度自相关函数分析，建立了识别结构相变微观机制的新框架。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

使用基于从头算数据训练的机器学习力场进行分子动力学模拟，通过分析畸变的位点-位点相关函数来研究相变机制。关键理论框架是将Q₂ Jahn-Teller畸变作为序参量，通过其有序化过程来表征相变的有序-无序本质。摘要未提及具体的机器学习势函数类型、训练数据集规模、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数量、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。边界条件设置、加载方式（温度控制方案）、使用的MD软件平台等技术细节在摘要中未明确说明。通过速度自相关函数分析来研究有限温度下的非谐效应和振动性质的温度演化。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

发现Jahn-Teller相变温度T_JT约为750K，相变由MnO₆八面体的Q₂ Jahn-Teller畸变有序化驱动，确认了该相变的有序-无序特性。在T_JT以上温度仍存在动态局域畸变，表明相变的渐进性质。模拟结果在结构性质和声子性质的温度依赖性方面与实验数据吻合良好，成功捕获了有限温度下的非谐效应。摘要未提供具体的应力值、畸变幅度、相关长度等定量数值，需查阅全文获取详细数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的机器学习分子动力学方法可直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟工作，特别是在处理复杂氧化物材料的结构相变问题。速度自相关函数分析技术可以借鉴到我的XPFC模型中，用于区分不同类型的相变机制和研究有限温度效应。Q₂畸变作为序参量的选择策略对我的相场晶体模拟中序参量定义具有重要参考价值。该工作建立的相变机制识别框架可以指导我在金属疲劳模拟中对微观结构演化机制的分析方法。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供的参数细节不足以完全复现，缺少机器学习势函数的具体类型、训练细节、模拟参数设置、计算资源需求等关键信息。建议重点精读方法学部分了解机器学习力场的构建过程，以及结果分析部分关于相关函数计算和相变机制判断的具体方法。

Here, building on the MLIP procedure adopted in Ref. 33, we re-examine the JT transition in LMO by monitoring the temperature evolution of the Q 2 and Q 3 JT modes across the orderdisorder transition. Our data describe well the progres- sive quenching of the JT modes with temperature and provide clear evidence for the persistence of dynamical JT distortions at high temperatures, as extracted from the site-site correla- tion function. Furthermore, we calculated the phonon disper- sion and identiﬁed the Ag(1) mode having the same symme- try as the static distortion pattern in the ordered phase. By Fourier transforming the velocity autocorrelation function of this mode, we obtained its temperature dependent spectral function, revealing strong anharmonic effects consistent with an orderdisorder phase transition. II. Following Ref. 33, a √ 2a × √ 2b × c supercell, rotated by 45◦ around the c axis, containing eight formula units was em- ployed for training the MLFF. 2604.13768v1.title: Anion Ordering and Phase Stability Govern Optical Band Gaps in BaZr(S,Se)3
2604.13768v1.summary: Chalcogenide perovskites have emerged as promising lead free materials for photovoltaic and thermoelectric applications. Among them, BaZrS3 has attracted particular attention due to its thermal and chemical stability, favorable optoelectronic properties, and low thermal conductivity. Here, we combine molecular dynamics and Monte Carlo simulations based on machine learned interatomic potentials with scanning transmission electron microscopy to investigate mixing thermodynamics and phase stability in the BaZr(S,Se)3 system. We identify an unusual ordered structure that persists at room temperature, most prominently at 33% S, where S and Se atoms form alternating layers within the crystal. Free energy calculations yield the temperature composition phase diagram, including a nonperovskite delta phase in the Se rich limit and a perovskite phase in the S rich limit, separated by a broad two phase region. Analysis of the dielectric function and the absorption coefficient demonstrates that composition, crystal structure, and anion ordering jointly control the optical band gap. Selenium alloying enables tuning between approximately 1.6 and 1.9eV, while anion ordering within a given composition reduces the gap by about 0.12eV. Lastly, variations between structural polymorphs give rise to band gap differences of up to 0.4eV.
2604.13768v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文研究硫族化合物钙钛矿BaZr(S,Se)3体系中阴离子有序化对相稳定性和光学带隙的影响机制，旨在为无铅光伏和热电材料设计提供理论指导。现有研究对BaZrS3的热力学稳定性和光电性质有一定认识，但缺乏对S/Se混合体系中阴离子有序化行为及其对带隙调控机制的深入理解。该工作的创新点在于结合机器学习势函数的分子动力学和蒙特卡洛模拟，系统揭示了阴离子有序化与相稳定性的关联及其对光学性质的调控规律。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

研究采用基于机器学习势函数的分子动力学(MD)和蒙特卡洛(MC)模拟方法，结合扫描透射电子显微镜实验验证。使用机器学习势函数描述原子间相互作用，但摘要未提及具体的势函数类型和训练数据集。MD模拟用于研究动力学行为和结构演化，MC模拟用于计算混合热力学和相图。摘要未提及具体的边界条件设置、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数量和时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。通过自由能计算构建温度-组分相图，识别富Se区的非钙钛矿δ相和富S区的钙钛矿相。使用介电函数和吸收系数分析方法研究光学性质与结构的关联。摘要未提及使用的具体软件平台。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现在33% S组分处存在室温稳定的有序结构，S和Se原子在晶体内形成交替层状排列。通过Se合金化可将光学带隙在约1.6-1.9eV范围内调节，阴离子有序化在给定组分下可使带隙降低约0.12eV。不同结构多晶型之间的带隙差异可达0.4eV。自由能计算揭示了富Se区非钙钛矿δ相与富S区钙钛矿相之间存在宽广的两相区。摘要未提供与已有实验或模拟结果的定量对比数据，需查阅全文了解模型精度验证情况。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的机器学习势函数方法可为我的多物理耦合场模拟提供高效的原子间相互作用描述方案，特别是在处理复杂合金体系时。阴离子有序化的MD模拟策略和自由能计算方法可直接应用于我的金属疲劳模拟中研究缺陷有序化对材料性能的影响。温度-组分相图的构建方法对我的相场晶体模型(XPFC)研究具有重要参考价值，可用于验证相变行为的预测准确性。MC模拟与MD模拟的结合策略为我的多尺度模拟提供了有效的方法论框架，特别是在研究热力学平衡态与动力学过程的耦合时。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要缺少关键的模拟参数细节，包括机器学习势函数的具体类型、训练方法、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数量、时间步长和使用的软件平台等信息，需查阅全文获取完整的计算细节。建议重点精读方法学部分了解机器学习势函数的构建过程，以及结果部分关于自由能计算和相图构建的具体实现方法。

In contrast, there are conflicting structures reported for the perovskite selenide end member. An early experi- mental attempt to synthesize stoichiometric BaZrSe3 via a solid-state reaction yielded off-stoichiometric, needle- like structures composed of face-sharing octahedra, rather than the corner-sharing perovskite network [25]. More recently, stoichiometric BaZrSe 3 in a closely re- lated face-sharing hexagonal phase has been reported for nanocrystalline samples prepared by hot injection [26]. First-principles studies constrained to the 1:1:3 stoichiometry instead predict a different edge-sharing polymorph withP nmasymmetry [27, 28]. Se-rich corner-sharing perovskite phases, including stoichiomet- ric BaZrSe 3, have been realized using non-equilibrium methods [16, 19]. Although these perovskite phases are likely metastable, they exhibit long-term stabil- ity at ambient conditions. 2604.13741v1.title: Universal thermometry of solid-liquid interfacial thermal conductance
2604.13741v1.summary: Solid-liquid interfacial thermal conductance (ITC) critically influences heat transport in microfluidic, electronic, and energy systems, yet most optical thermometry techniques are limited to specific metal-liquid interfaces. In this work, we introduce a universal broadband square-pulsed thermometry method that enables simultaneous quantification of ITC across a wide range of arbitrary solid-liquid interfaces, while also providing accurate measurements of nanoscale liquid-film thickness. To validate the method, we applied it to Al-water interfaces, yielding ITC values in the range of 50-55 MW m^(-2) K^(-1), consistent with prior studies. The technique also reveals markedly lower ITCs for glass-water (9.9 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)) and Si-water (5.7 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)), and further measurements on Al-silicone oil (~10 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)) and PMMA-silicone oil (~0.4 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)) extend the validation to highly viscous nonpolar liquids and polymer-liquid interfaces. These results highlight the capability of the method to capture thermal transport differences across diverse solid-liquid combinations. Further comparisons with acoustic/diffuse mismatch models and molecular dynamics simulations, together with theoretical analysis, highlight the influence of vibrational mismatch, wettability, and surface condition on interfacial thermal transport. This broadly applicable technique enables rapid, quantitative characterization of solid-liquid interfacial thermal transport, with broad implications for interfacial heat transfer science and technology.
2604.13741v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决固液界面热导率（ITC）的精确测量问题，这一参数对微流体、电子器件和能源系统中的热传输至关重要。现有光学测温技术主要局限于特定的金属-液体界面，无法实现跨材料体系的通用测量。该工作创新性地开发了一种通用宽带方波脉冲测温方法，能够同时定量测定任意固液界面的热导率并精确测量纳米级液膜厚度。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用实验测量结合分子动力学模拟的方法进行验证和理论分析。实验方面使用自主开发的宽带方波脉冲测温技术，通过光学手段同时测量界面热导率和液膜厚度。分子动力学模拟部分摘要未详细说明具体参数，需查阅全文获取势函数类型、模拟盒子尺寸、时间步长等关键信息。研究涵盖多种固液界面体系：Al-水、玻璃-水、Si-水、Al-硅油以及PMMA-硅油界面。理论分析结合声学失配模型和扩散失配模型来解释界面热传输机制。摘要未提及具体的MD软件平台、边界条件设置和加载方式，需查阅全文。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

实验测得Al-水界面热导率为50-55 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)，与先前研究结果一致，验证了方法的准确性。玻璃-水界面热导率显著降低至9.9 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)，Si-水界面更低至5.7 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)。对于非极性高粘度液体，Al-硅油界面热导率约为10 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)，而PMMA-硅油界面仅为0.4 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)。这些结果揭示了不同固液组合间热传输性能的巨大差异，证明了该方法捕获多样化界面热传输特性的能力。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文提供的精确界面热导率数值可直接用于我的多物理耦合场模拟中的边界条件设置，特别是涉及固液界面热传输的问题。分子动力学模拟与声学/扩散失配模型的对比分析方法可借鉴用于验证我的XPFC模型在界面问题上的准确性。论文揭示的振动失配、润湿性和表面状态对界面热传输的影响机制，为我在金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中考虑温度效应提供了重要参考。不同材料组合的热导率数据库可用于我的多尺度模拟中材料参数的选取和验证。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了主要的实验结果数值，但缺少分子动力学模拟的关键技术细节，如势函数选择、模拟参数设置等信息需查阅全文。建议重点精读方法学部分以了解测温技术的具体实现，以及分子动力学模拟与理论模型对比分析的章节，这些内容对理解界面热传输机制和验证模拟方法具有重要价值。

brief_cn.what_done: 该论文解决固液界面热导率（ITC）的精确测量问题，这一参数对微流体、电子器件和能源系统中的热传输至关重要。现有光学测温技术主要局限于特定的金属-液体界面，无法实现跨材料体系的通用测量。该工作创新性地开发了一种通用宽带方波脉冲测温方法，能够同时定量测定任意固液界面的热导率并精确测量纳米级液膜厚度。
brief_cn.method: 该研究采用实验测量结合分子动力学模拟的方法进行验证和理论分析。实验方面使用自主开发的宽带方波脉冲测温技术，通过光学手段同时测量界面热导率和液膜厚度。分子动力学模拟部分摘要未详细说明具体参数，需查阅全文获取势函数类型、模拟盒子尺寸、时间步长等关键信息。研究涵盖多种固液界面体系：Al-水、玻璃-水、Si-水、Al-硅油以及PMMA-硅油界面。理论分析结合声学失配模型和扩散失配模型来解释界面热传输机制。摘要未提及具体的MD软件平台、边界条件设置和加载方式，需查阅全文。
brief_cn.finding: 实验测得Al-水界面热导率为50-55 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)，与先前研究结果一致，验证了方法的准确性。玻璃-水界面热导率显著降低至9.9 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)，Si-水界面更低至5.7 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)。对于非极性高粘度液体，Al-硅油界面热导率约为10 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)，而PMMA-硅油界面仅为0.4 MW m^(-2) K^(-1)。这些结果揭示了不同固液组合间热传输性能的巨大差异，证明了该方法捕获多样化界面热传输特性的能力。
brief_cn.meaning: 该论文提供的精确界面热导率数值可直接用于我的多物理耦合场模拟中的边界条件设置，特别是涉及固液界面热传输的问题。分子动力学模拟与声学/扩散失配模型的对比分析方法可借鉴用于验证我的XPFC模型在界面问题上的准确性。论文揭示的振动失配、润湿性和表面状态对界面热传输的影响机制，为我在金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中考虑温度效应提供了重要参考。不同材料组合的热导率数据库可用于我的多尺度模拟中材料参数的选取和验证。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: *Corresponding Author: jpq2021@hust.edu.cn Universal thermometry of solid-liquid interfacial thermal conductance Tao Chen, Puqing Jianga) School of Energy and Power Engineering, Huazhong University of Science and Technology, Wuhan, Hubei 430074, PR China a)Authors to whom correspondence should be addressed: jpq2021@hust.edu.cn ABSTRACT: Solid-liquid interfacial thermal conductance (ITC) critically influences heat transport in microfluidic, electronic, and energy systems, yet most optical thermometry techniques are limited to specific metal-liquid interfaces. In this work, we introduce a universal broadband square-pulsed thermometry method that enables simultaneous quantification of ITC across a wide range of arbitrary solid-liquid interfaces, while also providing accurate measurements of nanoscale liquid-film thickness. To validate the method, we applied it to Al-water interfaces, yielding ITC values in the range of 50-55 MW m!" K!#, consistent with prior studies. The technique also reveals markedly lower ITCs for glass-water (9.9 MW m!" K!#) and Si-water (5.7 MW m!" K!#), and further measurements on Al-silicone oil (~10 MW m!" K!#) and PMMA-silicone oil (~0.4 MW m!" K!#) extend the validation to highly viscous nonpolar liquids and polymer-liquid interfaces. These results highlight the capability of the method to capture thermal transport differences across diverse solid-liquid combinations. 2604.13339v1.title: Uncovering the role of ionic doping in hydroxyapatite: The building blocks of tooth enamel and bones
2604.13339v1.summary: Hydroxyapatite (HAp) is the primary mineral component of various mineralized tissues in the human body, including bone and teeth, where it performs critical roles of structural support and load transmission. In the context of dental health, the two most crucial properties of HAp are mechanical stability, which ensures resistance to forces, and chemical stability, which preserves surface integrity in acidic environments. During early stages of human evolution, e.g. when teeth were used to crush uncooked food, mechanical stability was of paramount importance. However, with changes in diet and lifestyle, the principal origins of tooth damage and loss shifted towards bacterially mediated chemical attack, known as tooth decay, or caries. To enhance the chemical stability, ion doping has emerged as a particularly significant approach, and it lies at the focus of the present study. A Molecular Dynamics (MD) framework was developed to investigate the effects of ion doping on the chemical and mechanical stability of HAp and to identify optimal doping candidates. The framework combines conventional MD with Steered Molecular Dynamics (SMD), Thermodynamic Integration (TI) and uniaxial compression test simulations to provide comprehensive insights into the doping process. The findings revealed surface atoms as the most viable candidates for doping, as demonstrated by SMD and conventional MD simulations. Notably, TI calculations have identified magnesium ions as a better candidate among the ions considered here for enhancing the chemical stability of HAp. The results presented in this study offer valuable guidelines for synthesizing HAp-based substituent materials with properties tailored to meet the demands of modern dental applications such as implant coatings, enamel remineralization agents and restorative materials.
2604.13339v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决羟基磷灰石（HAp）作为人体骨骼和牙齿主要矿物成分的化学稳定性和机械稳定性优化问题，特别是在现代饮食环境下如何通过离子掺杂提高其抗酸性腐蚀能力。现有HAp材料在酸性环境中容易发生化学降解导致龋齿，而传统研究主要关注机械性能而忽视了化学稳定性的重要性。该工作的创新点在于建立了综合评估离子掺杂对HAp化学和机械双重稳定性影响的分子动力学框架，并通过热力学积分方法定量识别最优掺杂离子。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用分子动力学（MD）模拟框架，结合传统MD、牵引分子动力学（SMD）、热力学积分（TI）和单轴压缩测试模拟等多种方法。摘要未提及具体使用的势函数类型和版本，需查阅全文获取详细信息。模拟包括离子掺杂过程的SMD模拟来确定最佳掺杂位点，通过TI计算定量评估不同离子掺杂对化学稳定性的影响，以及单轴压缩测试评估机械性能变化。研究重点考察了表面原子作为掺杂位点的可行性，并对比了包括镁离子在内的多种离子的掺杂效果。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、时间步长、边界条件设置和使用的软件平台，这些关键参数需要查阅全文确认。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现表面原子是最可行的离子掺杂位点，这一结论通过SMD和传统MD模拟得到验证。热力学积分计算定量确定镁离子是所考察离子中提高HAp化学稳定性的最佳候选者。摘要未提及具体的数值结果，如应力值、能量变化、掺杂浓度范围等定量数据，需查阅全文获取详细的数值对比。该研究为合成具有定制化性能的HAp基替代材料提供了有价值的指导原则，特别是针对现代牙科应用如植入物涂层、牙釉质再矿化剂和修复材料的需求。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多物理场耦合模拟方法（结合化学稳定性和机械性能评估）与我的多物理耦合场模拟方向高度契合，特别是SMD与传统MD结合的策略可以借鉴到我的分子动力学研究中。热力学积分方法为定量评估材料性能提供了新思路，可应用于我的相场晶体模型验证和参数优化。单轴压缩测试的MD模拟设置可直接应用于我的金属拉伸变形模拟工作，为建立合适的加载条件和边界条件提供参考。离子掺杂对材料机械性能影响的研究思路也可扩展到金属疲劳模拟中的合金元素效应分析。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要缺少关键的模拟参数细节，包括势函数类型、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数量、时间步长、温度压力条件、具体的边界条件设置和使用的软件平台等信息，需要查阅全文获取完整的参数设置。建议重点精读方法学部分了解SMD和TI的具体实现细节，以及结果部分的定量数据分析，特别关注不同离子掺杂效果的对比数据和机械性能测试的具体数值结果。
