pdf_parse.method_excerpt: s crucial for effective dental health maintenance, treatment and the long-term preservation of tooth structure. To strike a balance between chemical and mechanical stability, the chemical content of HAp can be tailored through ionic doping that forms the topic of the present study. Ions can be incorporated into the tooth structure to enhance the chemical stability of HAp, improving its resistance to demineralization [6]. HAp doping with various ions has been previously investigated utilizing mostly experimental techniques, with studies considering specific dopants due to their unique properties. For instance, the antimicrobial properties of zinc (Zn) and silver (Ag) motivated several studies to investigate either Zn- or Ag-doped HAps [7-11]. In the case of Ag doping, better antibacterial protection against gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria was observed [9, 10]. Various synthetic methods such as co-precipitation and pulsed laser deposition have been considered and optimized to achieve a uniform distribution of silver ions that is important for the structural integrity of HAp [10, 11]. Magnesium, fluoride and carbonate have also been extensively researched in the context of ionic doping of HAp [12-22]. The incorporation of Mg²⁺ at the level of 1 mol% has been shown 4 to enhance bioactivity, particularly by supporting the proliferation and differentiation of osteoblastic cells — key processes involved in the early stages of bone regeneration [12, 13]. Introducing fluoride ions into the HAp structure leads to the formation of fluorapatite, which has improved stability...

2604.07271v1.title: Physics-Informed 3D Atomic Reconstruction and Dynamics of Free-Standing Graphene from Single Low-Dose TEM Images
2604.07271v1.summary: Resolving the three-dimensional (3D) atomic geometry of free-standing graphene in real time is essential for understanding how intrinsic rippling governs its electronic properties. However, the low electron doses required to mitigate radiation damage impose severe signal-to-noise constraints that limit conventional reconstruction methods. Here, we present a physics-informed computational framework that reconstructs 3D atomic coordinates of single-layer graphene from individual low-dose transmission electron microscopy (TEM) frames (8x10^3 e-/Ang^2, 1 ms temporal resolution). The approach combines simulated annealing optimisation with molecular dynamics regularisation, achieving sub-angstrom out-of-plane accuracy (sigma_z < 0.45 Ang), validated against ground-truth simulations. A Kullback-Leibler divergence-based calibration aligns the forward model with experimental image statistics, reducing systematic bias. Applied to high-speed time-series data, the framework enables simultaneous extraction of real-time ripple dynamics, strain tensors, surface curvature, bond-length distributions, and density functional theory (DFT)-derived electron localisation functions (ELF). We establish quantitative relationships linking local geometry, strain, and bond-length variations to electron localisation, demonstrating that sub-angstrom structural fluctuations drive spatially localised, millisecond-scale electronic modulation. A critical dose threshold is identified below which structural information becomes irrecoverable, providing practical guidance for experimental design. The framework is broadly applicable to beam-sensitive two-dimensional materials.
2604.07271v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了自由悬浮石墨烯在低剂量透射电镜条件下的三维原子结构实时重构问题，这对理解石墨烯内在波纹如何影响其电子性质至关重要。现有重构方法在低电子剂量（8×10³ e⁻/Å²）条件下受到严重的信噪比限制，无法准确重构三维原子坐标。该工作创新性地结合了物理约束的计算框架，将模拟退火优化与分子动力学正则化相结合，实现了亚埃级精度的三维重构。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用物理约束的计算框架，核心方法结合了模拟退火优化算法和分子动力学正则化技术。分子动力学部分使用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算电子局域化函数（ELF），但摘要未提及具体的势函数类型和MD软件平台，需查阅全文。实验数据来源于低剂量透射电镜单帧图像，电子剂量为8×10³ e⁻/Å²，时间分辨率达到1毫秒。采用Kullback-Leibler散度校准方法将前向模型与实验图像统计特性对齐，减少系统偏差。重构精度达到亚埃级别，面外方向标准差σz < 0.45 Å。边界条件和具体模拟参数（原子数、时间步长等）摘要未提及，需查阅全文。该框架能够同时提取实时波纹动力学、应变张量、表面曲率、键长分布等多物理量信息。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

重构方法实现了面外方向亚埃级精度（σz < 0.45 Å），通过与真实模拟数据对比验证了方法的准确性。研究建立了局部几何结构、应变和键长变化与电子局域化之间的定量关系，发现亚埃级结构波动能够驱动空间局域化的毫秒级电子调制。确定了结构信息可恢复的临界剂量阈值，低于此阈值结构信息将无法恢复。该方法在1毫秒时间分辨率下能够捕获石墨烯的实时动态行为，为理解二维材料的结构-性能关系提供了新的实验手段。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的物理约束重构框架对我的多物理耦合场模拟具有重要借鉴价值，特别是将分子动力学作为正则化约束的思路可以应用于相场晶体模型（XPFC）的参数优化中。亚埃级精度的结构重构方法可以为我的金属疲劳模拟提供更准确的初始缺陷结构，特别是在处理表面波纹和局部应变分布时。该研究建立的几何结构与电子性质关联的定量方法，可以指导我在拉伸变形模拟中如何评估局部应变对材料性能的影响。毫秒级时间分辨率的动态追踪技术为我的疲劳裂纹扩展模拟提供了时间尺度参考。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了关键的精度指标（σz < 0.45 Å）和实验参数（8×10³ e⁻/Å²剂量，1毫秒分辨率），但缺少具体的MD势函数类型、软件平台、原子数量和时间步长等关键模拟参数。建议重点精读方法学部分了解模拟退火与MD正则化的具体实现细节，以及结果部分关于结构-电子性质关联的定量分析方法。

2604.07077v1.title: Unveiling Mechanisms of SEI Formation and Sodium Loss in Sodium Batteries via Interface Reactor Sampling
2604.07077v1.summary: The solid electrolyte interphase SEI critically dictates the cyclability and Coulombic efficiency of sodium-metal batteries, yet its dynamic formation mechanisms and atomic-scale evolution during electrochemical cycling remain elusive due to the spatiotemporal limitations of existing techniques. Here, an "Interface Reactor" sampling strategy is proposed to construct a charge-aware neuroevolution potential (qNEP). This approach overcomes the instability bottlenecks of conventional machine learning potentials, enabling stable, first-principles-accurate molecular dynamics simulations of complex electrode-electrolyte interfaces on the hundred-nanosecond scale. Fundamentally distinct SEI formation mechanisms are revealed during the early stage: carbonate-based electrolytes form heterogeneous organic-inorganic matrices via "mixed co-formation," whereas ether-based electrolytes generate dense, self-limiting inorganic barriers through "surface-energy-controlled" NaF crystallization. Metadynamics simulations further elucidate that these compositional disparities govern sodium-ion storage dynamics: NaF-rich SEIs facilitate efficient metallic deposition, while carbonate-dominated interphases induce irreversible sodium trapping and continuous electrolyte decomposition. These findings establish a comprehensive atomic-scale framework linking solvation structure, interfacial reaction networks, and electrochemical performance, providing mechanistic guidelines for rational SEI engineering in next-generation alkali-metal batteries. Crucially, a general and robust computational framework is established for simulating complex interfacial reactions in electrochemical systems.
2604.07077v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决钠金属电池中固体电解质界面层（SEI）动态形成机制和原子尺度演化过程的科学问题，这一问题在电化学循环过程中由于现有技术的时空限制而难以阐明。现有机器学习势函数在复杂电极-电解质界面模拟中存在不稳定性瓶颈，无法实现长时间尺度的第一性原理精度分子动力学模拟。该工作创新性地提出"界面反应器"采样策略构建电荷感知神经进化势函数（qNEP），突破了传统方法的局限性。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究使用分子动力学（MD）结合电荷感知神经进化势函数（qNEP）进行多物理耦合模拟，通过"界面反应器"采样策略克服传统机器学习势函数的不稳定性问题。核心理论框架基于第一性原理精度的神经网络势函数，能够处理复杂的电极-电解质界面反应网络。模拟实现了百纳秒时间尺度的稳定计算，这是传统DFT方法无法达到的时间范围。研究采用元动力学（Metadynamics）模拟进一步揭示钠离子存储动力学机制。摘要未提及具体的边界条件设置、原子数规模、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。同样，使用的具体软件平台信息在摘要中未明确提及。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现碳酸酯基电解质通过"混合共形成"机制形成异质有机-无机基质SEI，而醚基电解质通过"表面能控制"的NaF结晶过程生成致密的自限制无机屏障。元动力学模拟揭示富含NaF的SEI促进高效金属沉积，而碳酸酯主导的界面层导致不可逆钠离子捕获和持续电解质分解。该研究建立了连接溶剂化结构、界面反应网络和电化学性能的原子尺度框架。摘要未提及具体的应力值、温度范围、缺陷密度等定量数值，需查阅全文获取详细数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的电荷感知神经进化势函数（qNEP）方法对我的多物理耦合场模拟研究具有重要借鉴价值，特别是在处理复杂界面反应时的稳定性问题。"界面反应器"采样策略可以直接应用于我的分子动力学模拟中，用于构建更稳定的机器学习势函数。百纳秒时间尺度的模拟能力为我的金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟提供了时间尺度扩展的技术路径。元动力学方法在揭示离子存储动力学方面的应用可以启发我在相场晶体模型（XPFC）中引入类似的增强采样技术来研究缺陷演化机制。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了方法论框架但缺少关键的模拟参数细节，如具体的原子数、时间步长、温度条件、势函数参数等信息需要查阅全文。建议重点精读方法学部分了解qNEP构建细节和界面反应器采样策略，以及结果部分的定量分析数据和与实验结果的对比验证。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: Methods The qNEP training hyperparameters . Graphics Processing Units Molecular Dynamics (GPUMD) v4.3 was used to train the qNEP model36,37. Detailed information regarding the multi-loss training algorithm based on the qNEP model and SNES, as well as the nep.in input file used, can be found in Supplementary Note S1–S2. In general, the selection of the cutoff radius and the number of neurons pre sents a trade -off among computational speed, accuracy, and the risk of overfitting 26. In contrast, the choice of n_max, l_max, and batch size primarily involves a trade -off between accuracy and speed 38. Therefore, to balance these competing factors , we prioritized increasing the number of neurons, n_max, and the batch size. The NEP -4 model26 was trained with the batch size Nbat of full batch, while the number of neurons Nneu was set to 50. The radial descriptor indices nmax R of 8 and angular descriptor indices nmax A were 8. The numbers of radial and angular descriptor basis functions, Nbas R and Nbas A were both set to 8. Concurrently, a radial cutoff of 6.5 Å and an angular cutoff of 4.0 Å were set to achieve an 6 optimal balance between accuracy and resolution. The population size Nbat was set to 50, and steps Ngen was set to 500,000. The training took approximately 2 days on 4 × RTX 4090 GPUs. The total number of trainable parameters in the model for 6 elements is 22,633, which demonstrates the data efficiency of the NEP model39,40. 2604.15211v1.title: 3D Finite Element-Based Multiphysics Simulation of a Shape Memory Alloy Hybrid Composite Module
2604.15211v1.summary: Shape adaptive shape memory alloy hybrid composites (SMAHCs) are composites that incorporate shape memory alloys (SMAs) to realize shape transformation. Despite the availability of numerous analytical and finite element models for predicting the transient response of SMAHCs, many approaches exhibit limitations with respect to the thermomechanical coupling and comprehensive experimental validation. Therefore, this paper presents a coupled, multiphysics, 3D finite element approach for the simulation of a SMAHC actuator, integrating mechanical, thermal and electromagnetic solvers in the Finite Element Code ANSYS LS-DYNA. The proposed approach employs a micromechanical constitutive model implemented in ANSYS LS-DYNA, to accurately capture the complex thermomechanical phase transformation of SMAs. A key feature of the model is the ability to prescribe a defined martensitic pre-strain through a preceding simulation step, in which an initially scaled SMA wire is mechanically loaded and stretched to its nominal length. This procedure enables partial detwinning of the martensitic microstructure and provides a physically motivated initialization of the material state. Joule heating of the SMA wires, as well as varying mechanical loads and ambient temperature conditions, are explicitly considered. The simulation results are validated against experimental data and a fully coupled transient staggered scheme model to assess the predictive capability of the 3D approach. The results show good qualitative agreement, reproducing the characteristic hysteresis of actuator deflection as a function of temperature. Quantitatively, the predicted deflections are of the correct order of magnitude, although marginally outside the 95 % experimental confidence interval. Overall, a consistent trend between simulation and experiment is observed, giving rise to possibility of simulating more complex SMAHC systems.
2604.15211v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决形状记忆合金混合复合材料（SMAHCs）的多物理场耦合模拟问题，这类材料能够通过形状记忆合金实现形状变换功能。现有的解析模型和有限元方法在热机械耦合方面存在局限性，且缺乏全面的实验验证。该工作的创新点在于建立了集成机械、热学和电磁求解器的三维多物理场耦合有限元方法，并通过预应变初始化程序实现了马氏体微结构的物理化初始化。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

采用ANSYS LS-DYNA有限元平台，集成机械、热学和电磁三个求解器构建多物理场耦合模型。使用微观力学本构模型来描述形状记忆合金的复杂热机械相变行为，该模型已在ANSYS LS-DYNA中实现。关键创新是通过预处理仿真步骤实现马氏体预应变的定义，即对初始缩放的SMA丝进行机械加载并拉伸至标称长度，实现马氏体微结构的部分去孪晶化。模型显式考虑了SMA丝的焦耳加热效应、变化的机械载荷和环境温度条件。采用完全耦合的瞬态交错求解方案进行计算。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、网格规模、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

仿真结果与实验数据和完全耦合瞬态交错方案模型进行了验证对比，定性上能够很好地重现致动器挠度随温度变化的特征滞回特性。定量方面，预测的挠度值在正确的数量级范围内，但略微超出了95%的实验置信区间。整体上仿真与实验之间呈现一致的趋势，证明了该方法模拟更复杂SMAHC系统的可能性。摘要未提及具体的应力值、温度范围、挠度数值等定量参数，需查阅全文。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多物理场耦合方法对我的多物理耦合场模拟研究具有直接借鉴价值，特别是热-机-电三场耦合的实现方案。微观力学本构模型的实现方式可为我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）与宏观力学行为的耦合提供参考。预应变初始化的处理方法对我的金属疲劳模拟中初始缺陷状态的设定具有启发意义。ANSYS LS-DYNA平台的多物理场求解器集成方案可为我当前的拉伸变形模拟提供软件平台选择和边界条件设计的参考。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了方法框架和验证思路，但缺少关键的数值参数如网格尺寸、时间步长、材料参数、边界条件设置等复现必需信息，需查阅全文获取完整参数。建议重点精读方法部分的本构模型实现细节、多物理场耦合求解方案以及预应变初始化程序的具体实现步骤。

In order to support the design process of material integrated actuators, such as SMAHC within the context of computer-aided engineering (CAE) on a broader basis than today, 3D FE-Based Multiphysics Simulation of a SMAHC actuator module4 sufficiently simple but reliable models are required which – in contrast to Turners widely accepted approach – also precisely describe the dynamic thermomechanical response of the SMA material under various boundary conditions. If the exact 3D geometry of the application is important, multiphysics FE modeling today provides a useful engineering tool to describe and help to predict a wide range of physical phenomena. However, until today, there is no comprehensive and satisfactorily validated method that simulates a detailed 3D FE model of an SMAHC, taking into account boundary conditions such as ambient temperatures and applied loads, while also accounting for full electro-thermo- mechanical coupling. In the present study we therefore investigated a the capability of a new material model [25] that was recently implemented in the FE-based simulation software ANSYS LS-DYNA [26] to model not only the response of SMA, namely its pseudoplasticity, superelasticity and one way shape memory effect, but also a complete SMAHC, exhibiting also external two way shape memory effect. 2604.14559v1.title: Persistent Free Volume Governs (Anti-)plasticization in Chitosan-Water Mixtures
2604.14559v1.summary: Chitosan is a highly versatile and sustainable polymer with a broad range of potential biological and materials engineering applications. Despite its versatility, the native brittleness of chitosan limits its broader utilization. This limitation can be addressed by blending chitosan with small-molecule additives to modulate its thermomechanical properties. We employ molecular dynamics (MD) simulations to investigate the mechanism underlying antiplasticization followed by plasticization at increasing water content. Decomposition of the elastic moduli reveals a competition between weakened polymer-polymer interactions and enhanced polymer-water interactions, with their relative strengths governing the resulting properties. We introduce a simple model incorporating dynamically accessible free volume regions as a key driver of polymer mobility, effectively capturing the (anti-)plasticization of elastic properties. We show that accessibility of free volume regions is enabled by connectivity of additive-accessible volume regions. This study provides new insights into the molecular interactions that dictate the properties of chitosan-water mixtures and may inform the rational design of chitosan-based materials and other hydrated biopolymers.
2604.14559v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决壳聚糖（chitosan）材料脆性限制其广泛应用的工程问题，通过添加小分子添加剂（特别是水）来调控其热机械性能。现有方法对壳聚糖-水混合物中先出现反增塑化后出现增塑化现象的分子机理缺乏深入理解，无法有效指导材料设计。该工作的创新点在于提出了基于动态可达自由体积区域的简单模型来解释增塑/反增塑机制，并揭示了添加剂可达体积区域连通性对自由体积可达性的控制作用。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

使用分子动力学（MD）模拟方法研究壳聚糖-水混合物的热机械性能变化机制。摘要未提及具体的势函数类型、边界条件设置、模拟尺寸和时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。研究采用弹性模量分解方法分析聚合物-聚合物相互作用和聚合物-水相互作用之间的竞争关系。建立了包含动态可达自由体积区域的理论模型来描述聚合物链段运动性，该模型能够有效捕获弹性性能的增塑/反增塑行为。通过分析添加剂可达体积区域的连通性来解释自由体积区域的可达性变化。摘要未明确提及使用的MD软件平台，需查阅全文确认。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现壳聚糖-水混合物在增加水含量过程中先出现反增塑化现象随后转为增塑化现象，这种转变由聚合物-聚合物相互作用减弱和聚合物-水相互作用增强之间的相对强度决定。提出的自由体积模型成功预测了弹性性能的变化趋势，证明动态可达自由体积是控制聚合物链段运动性的关键因素。摘要未提供具体的应力值、温度范围或水含量的定量数据，需查阅全文获取详细数值结果。模型适用于解释水合生物聚合物的增塑行为。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的自由体积理论模型可以直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟中，特别是在研究聚合物材料的塑性变形和疲劳行为时考虑自由体积演化的影响。弹性模量分解方法可以借鉴到我的拉伸变形模拟中，用于分析不同相互作用对材料力学性能的贡献。添加剂可达体积区域连通性的概念对我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）研究具有启发意义，可以用于描述缺陷或第二相的连通性对材料性能的影响。该工作提供的分子层面机理理解可以指导我在金属疲劳模拟中考虑环境因素（如湿度）对材料性能的影响机制。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要缺少关键的模拟参数信息，包括势函数类型、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数、时间步长、温度和压力条件等，需要查阅全文的方法部分获取完整的模拟细节。建议重点精读方法学部分了解MD模拟设置和自由体积模型的具体实现，以及结果部分的弹性模量分解分析和自由体积-性能关系的定量描述。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: relaxation of a radical probe. 42 While this technique indicates enhanced plasticizer dynamics at the population level, it re- lies on indirect measurements using a radical probe and does not provide insights into the mechanism of plasticization.43 A positron annihilation lifetime spectroscopy (PALS) study44 3 of chitosan-water systems reveals decreasing polymer free volume upon hydration, consis- tent with other hydrated biopolymers. 45–47 While PALS provides sub-nanometer insights into the free volume trends in polymer-additive systems, the average hole size is obtained from a simplified model containing monodisperse spherical holes. 48,49 However, it has been shown that these molecular voids are neither spherical nor monodisperse. 50 Consequently, the atomic-level mechanism of (anti-)plasticization of chitosan and other biopolymers is not yet fully understood. Computational modeling methods can provide insight into the molecular-level physics that may not be accessible by experiment or theoretical frameworks. Several studies employ MD simulations to characterize the thermomechanical properties of plasticized polymers, particularly biopolymers, across diverse chemistries. 51–54 However, there is very limited lit- erature employing computational methods to elucidate the plasticization of chitosan sys- tems.51 Plasticization of starch and cellulose derivatives with additives, including water, polyols, and drug molecules, has been characterized with MD simulations. 52–54 An investi- gation of starch-glycerol systems has suggested the cooperative motion of local plasticize...

2604.06048v1.title: Large Language Model Assisted Discovery of Optimal Dopants for Enhanced Thermoelectric Performance in CoSb$_3$ Based Skutterudites
2604.06048v1.summary: We present a data-driven approach for accelerating the discovery of high-performance CoSb$_3$-based skutterudites by curating a comprehensive dataset of compositions with various filler elements from over 300 research articles. Leveraging large language models (LLMs), we extract and embed compositional representations, which are then used to train a regression head for predicting thermoelectric figure of merit. Compared to traditional deep neural networks relying on elemental descriptors such as atomic radii, our LLM-based model achieves significantly lower mean-squared error losses. We further employ the trained model to propose novel filler compositions with promising thermoelectric properties. Finally, we support these predicted candidates through density functional theory and molecular dynamics calculations to assess their electrical and thermal conductivity. This data-driven approach demonstrates the potential of combining natural language processing, machine learning, and quantum simulations for thermoelectric materials design.
2604.06048v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决的是CoSb₃基方钴矿热电材料中最优掺杂元素的发现问题，在提高热电性能的背景下提出。传统的热电材料设计依赖于试错法和有限的实验筛选，效率低下且成本高昂。现有的机器学习方法主要依赖原子半径等元素描述符，对复杂组分的预测精度有限。该工作的创新点在于首次将大语言模型与热电材料设计结合，通过自然语言处理技术提取组分表征，实现更精确的热电性能预测。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用了数据驱动的多尺度建模方法，结合大语言模型、机器学习和量子模拟。从超过300篇研究文献中构建了CoSb₃基方钴矿的综合数据集，涵盖各种填充元素组分。使用大语言模型提取和嵌入组分表征，训练回归模型预测热电优值系数ZT。摘要未提及具体的LLM模型类型和训练参数。对于预测的候选材料，采用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算电导率，使用分子动力学（MD）模拟评估热导率。摘要未提及DFT计算的交换关联泛函类型、k点网格设置，以及MD模拟的势函数类型、模拟盒子尺寸、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

LLM基础的模型相比传统的基于元素描述符的深度神经网络实现了显著更低的均方误差损失，但摘要未提供具体的数值对比。该方法成功提出了具有良好热电性能前景的新型填充元素组分。通过DFT和MD计算验证了预测候选材料的电导率和热导率特性，但摘要未给出具体的导电率数值、ZT值范围或与实验数据的对比结果，需查阅全文获取定量结论。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的机器学习辅助材料设计思路对我的多物理耦合场模拟工作具有重要启发，特别是在材料性能预测和候选筛选方面。其DFT-MD耦合计算框架可以直接应用于我的金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中，用于评估不同合金成分对力学性能的影响。论文中的数据驱动方法可以指导我在XPFC模型参数优化中引入机器学习技术，提高相场模拟的预测精度。MD模拟热导率的计算方法可以为我的多物理耦合模拟中的热传导模块提供参考。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供的参数细节不足以完全复现该工作，缺少LLM模型架构、训练超参数、DFT计算设置、MD势函数选择等关键信息。建议重点精读方法学部分以获取详细的计算参数，以及结果与讨论部分了解具体的性能数值和验证结果。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: s are filled with external atoms, CoSb3-based skutterudites can efficiently convert heat into electricity and typically exhibit thermoelectric ZT values greater than 1.0 18,19. A wide range of elements from the alkali-earth and lanthanide groups have been used as filler atoms in CoSb3-based skutterudites 20–23. The type and concentration of these filler atoms play crucial roles in affecting the electrical and thermal conductivity of the material. While skutterudites with single, binary, or ternary filler atoms have been studied efficiently, a deeper fundamental understanding is needed to guide the rational design of these thermoelectric materials 5 and to overcome the challenge of simultaneously achieving high electrical conductivity, low thermal conductivity, and a high ZT value 13,24–26. Traditionally, the discovery of thermoelectric materials relied on experimental trial and error method combined with computational techniques like density functional theory (DFT) and molecular dynamics (MD) 27–29. These computational techniques are generally very expensive in terms of time and computational resources 30. This limits to screen through the vast chemical and compositional space of thermoelectric materials 31–33. This challenge has prompted a growing interest in data-driven and machine learning (ML) techniques, which aim to accelerate materials discovery by leveraging existing data to predict thermoelectric properties, thereby reducing dependence on resource-heavy first-principles simulations 27,34–36. Artificial neural networks (ANNs) 37,38 have gained popularity as forwa...

2604.03913v1.title: A molecular dynamics simulation of thermalization of crystalline lattice with harmonic interaction
2604.03913v1.summary: Understanding the realization of thermal equilibrium through the thermalization process in a many-body system is a fundamental and complex scientific question, bridging thermodynamics and classical dynamics and connecting to a host of physical phenomena, such as mechanical instabilities in a thermal environment. In this work, based on the harmonic lattice model, we investigate the thermalization process in both velocity and coordinate spaces, by examining microscopic dynamics on the atomic level. We show the distinct relaxation rates of the transverse and longitudinal components of the velocity, reveal the power law governing the nonlinear proliferation of dominant frequencies, and observe the concurrent rapid proliferations of frequencies and topological defects. We also show that the lattice system's persistent out-of-plane deformations exhibit two-stage fluctuation behaviors, characterized by distinct power laws of fractional exponents and associated with the broken up-down symmetry. This work demonstrates the rich dynamics underlying the thermalization process, and advances our understanding on the dynamical adaptations of many-body systems to external disturbances.
2604.03913v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文研究多体系统中通过热化过程实现热平衡的基本科学问题，这一问题连接了热力学与经典动力学，并与热环境中的机械不稳定性等物理现象相关。现有研究对热化过程中微观原子层面的动力学机制理解不够深入，特别是速度和坐标空间中的不同弛豫行为缺乏系统性分析。该工作基于谐振子晶格模型，从原子尺度微观动力学角度揭示热化过程的丰富动力学行为，为理解多体系统对外部扰动的动力学适应提供新见解。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用分子动力学模拟方法，基于谐振子晶格模型进行热化过程模拟。控制方程为经典牛顿运动方程，势函数采用谐振子相互作用势，具体形式为简谐振子势能函数。摘要未提及具体的边界条件设置、模拟尺寸、原子数量、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。加载方式涉及对晶格系统施加外部扰动以触发热化过程，但具体的扰动类型和强度摘要中未详细说明。研究重点分析了速度空间中横向和纵向分量的不同弛豫速率，以及坐标空间中面外变形的两阶段涨落行为。摘要未提及使用的具体软件平台，需查阅全文确认是否使用LAMMPS等标准MD软件或自研代码。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现速度的横向和纵向分量具有不同的弛豫速率，揭示了主导频率非线性增殖遵循幂律规律。观察到频率和拓扑缺陷的同步快速增殖现象，表明热化过程中存在复杂的耦合机制。晶格系统的持续面外变形表现出两阶段涨落行为，每个阶段都由不同的分数指数幂律特征化，这与上下对称性破缺相关。摘要未提供具体的数值结果，如应力值、温度范围、缺陷密度等定量参数，也未提及与已有实验或模拟结果的对比情况，需查阅全文获取详细数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的谐振子晶格模型和热化过程分析方法可以为我的多物理耦合场模拟提供理论基础，特别是在研究温度场与力学场耦合时的微观机制。速度空间中横向和纵向分量的不同弛豫行为分析方法可以应用到我的金属疲劳模拟中，帮助理解循环加载下原子运动的各向异性特征。面外变形的两阶段涨落行为及其幂律特征可以为我的拉伸变形模拟提供新的分析视角，特别是在研究变形过程中的对称性破缺现象。该工作揭示的频率和拓扑缺陷同步增殖机制对我的相场晶体模型(XPFC)研究具有重要启发，可以帮助理解缺陷演化与晶格振动的耦合关系。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要缺少关键的模拟参数信息，包括具体的势函数参数、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数量、时间步长、温度控制方法等，需要查阅全文的方法部分获取完整参数设置。建议重点精读方法部分了解谐振子势函数的具体形式和参数设置，以及结果部分关于幂律行为的定量分析和拓扑缺陷识别方法，这些内容对复现研究和理解核心机制最为关键。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: ey results of this work are presented below. (1) We first show the significantly faster relaxation of the lon- gitudinal component of the velocity compared with that of the transverse component, both of which ultimately converge to the Maxwell distribution of common temper- ature that is proportional to the squared strength of ini- tial disturbance. (2) A power law governing the nonlinear proliferation of dominant frequencies is revealed; the ex- ponent is tunable by the disturbance strength. A discrete theoretical model is proposed to explain the nonlinear feature in the frequency proliferation process. (3) Anal- ysis of the drum system’s persistent in-plane and out- of-plane fluctuations reveals the concurrent rapid prolif- erations of frequencies and topological defects, and the two-stage fluctuation behaviors associated with the bro- ken up-down symmetry, respectively. II. MODEL AND METHOD The model consists of a harmonic triangular lattice of circular shape with anchored boundary, constituting a drum-like configuration; see Fig. 1. In the drum model, theNparticles are connected by identical linear springs of stiffnessk 0 and rest lengthℓ 0, and they are allowed to move in 3D space. Note that we also consider the case where the motion of particles is confined on the plane of the drum (denoted as thex−yplane). To implement the anchored boundary condition, the particles within the annulus (in orange) are fixed in space. The lattice is initially in mechanical equilibrium; the lattice spacing is equal toℓ 0, the rest length of the spring. In this work, the length, mass,...

2604.10355v1.title: Miscibility and Transport Properties in Hydrogen-Neon Mixtures
2604.10355v1.summary: The mixing behavior of hydrogen with heavier elements plays a key role in modeling the interiors of giant planets such as Jupiter and Saturn. Using density functional theory combined with molecular dynamics, we investigate hydrogen-neon mixtures and find that the minimum pressure required to trigger phase separation is substantially lower than in hydrogen-helium mixtures. Our simulations further reveal that the presence of neon stabilizes hydrogen molecules even at temperatures of 10000 K and pressures of 10 Mbar, similar to trends observed in hydrogen-helium mixtures but significantly more pronounced. This stabilization is accompanied by a reduction of several orders of magnitude in the electrical conductivity compared to pure hydrogen. These results, together with the larger X-ray scattering cross section of neon, establish hydrogen-neon as a valuable experimental surrogate for probing phase separation in hydrogen-rich mixtures and provide new insight into the physical mechanisms in hydrogen and mixtures with heavier elements under planetary interior conditions
2604.10355v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文研究氢-氖混合物在行星内部极端条件下的相分离行为和输运性质，主要针对木星和土星等巨行星内部建模中氢与重元素混合行为的关键科学问题。现有氢-氦混合物研究存在实验观测困难的局限性，因为氦的X射线散射截面较小。该工作创新性地提出氢-氖混合物作为实验替代体系，利用氖更大的X射线散射截面来探测氢富混合物中的相分离现象。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

研究采用密度泛函理论结合分子动力学（DFT-MD）方法进行模拟计算。摘要未提及具体的DFT交换关联泛函类型、赝势选择等关键理论框架细节，需查阅全文。模拟条件覆盖温度10000 K和压力10 Mbar的极端行星内部环境。摘要未提及具体的模拟盒子尺寸、原子数目、时间步长、边界条件设置等关键参数，需查阅全文。同样未提及使用的具体软件平台（如VASP、CP2K、ABAQUS等）和计算资源配置。研究重点关注相分离的最小触发压力阈值以及氢分子在高温高压下的稳定性机制。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现氢-氖混合物发生相分离所需的最小压力显著低于氢-氦混合物。在10000 K温度和10 Mbar压力条件下，氖的存在能够稳定氢分子，这种稳定化效应比氢-氦混合物中观察到的趋势更加显著。氢-氖混合物的电导率相比纯氢降低了几个数量级。摘要未提及具体的压力阈值数值、电导率的具体数值范围以及与实验数据的定量对比，需查阅全文获取精确数值。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的DFT-MD耦合方法可直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟研究中，特别是在处理金属材料在极端条件下的相变和输运性质方面。高温高压下的分子稳定性机制研究为我的金属疲劳模拟提供了原子尺度的理论基础，特别是在理解缺陷形成和演化机制方面。该工作中关于电导率随组分变化的研究方法可借鉴到我的拉伸变形模拟中，用于分析变形过程中材料电学性质的变化。相分离压力阈值的计算方法对我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）中相界面能计算具有参考价值。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要缺少关键的模拟参数细节，包括DFT计算设置、模拟盒子规模、原子数目、时间步长等，需查阅全文方法部分获取完整参数。建议重点精读方法部分的DFT-MD计算细节和结果部分的定量数据分析，特别关注相分离判据的定义和电导率计算方法。

2604.03413v1.title: Anatomy of a Complex Crystallization Pathway
2604.03413v1.summary: Using molecular dynamics simulations, we investigate the crystallization pathways of two exemplary systems that form the same complex crystal structure but differ fundamentally in the nature of their particle interactions. One system is composed of point particles interacting via an isotropic pair potential characteristic of metallic compounds, while the other system contains hard polyhedra whose interactions arise from emergent entropic forces. Despite the stark difference in the origins of the particle interactions, we find that both systems are polymorphic and share the same crystal polymorphs. Moreover, the two systems follow the same multistep crystallization pathways, and by examining the complex crystallization pathways on the single particle level, we find that the local structure evolution of the two systems is also similar. By mapping the hard particle system's interaction to an effective pairwise potential, we find that such resemblance arises from the particle interactions being effectively similar.
2604.03413v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文研究复杂晶体结构的结晶路径问题，探讨不同粒子相互作用机制下的结晶行为。研究对比了两种根本不同的体系：一种是通过各向同性对势相互作用的点粒子（类似金属化合物），另一种是通过熵力相互作用的硬多面体粒子。现有研究缺乏对不同相互作用机制下相同复杂晶体结构形成路径的系统性对比分析。该工作的创新点在于揭示了不同物理机制驱动下相同结晶路径的内在联系。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

研究采用分子动力学（MD）模拟方法研究两种不同体系的结晶过程。第一个体系使用点粒子模型，通过各向同性对势函数描述粒子间相互作用，该势函数特征类似于金属化合物的相互作用。第二个体系采用硬多面体粒子模型，粒子间相互作用源于熵力效应。摘要未提及具体的势函数类型、边界条件设置、模拟尺寸、原子数量、时间步长等关键技术参数，需查阅全文获取。研究通过单粒子水平的局部结构演化分析来追踪复杂的多步结晶路径。摘要未提及使用的具体MD软件平台，需查阅全文确认。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现两种体系尽管相互作用机制截然不同，但都表现出多晶型性质并共享相同的晶体多晶型结构。两个体系遵循相同的多步结晶路径，在单粒子水平上的局部结构演化也表现出相似性。通过将硬粒子体系的相互作用映射到有效的成对势函数，发现这种相似性源于粒子相互作用在本质上是有效相似的。摘要未提及具体的数值结果，如应力值、温度范围、缺陷密度等定量参数，需查阅全文获取详细数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文对多物理耦合场模拟和分子动力学研究具有重要参考价值，特别是在理解不同相互作用机制下的结晶行为方面。研究中将不同物理机制映射到有效势函数的方法可以为我的MD模拟中势函数选择和验证提供思路。单粒子水平的局部结构演化分析方法可以应用到金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中，用于追踪缺陷形成和演化过程。该工作揭示的多步结晶路径分析方法对于理解相场晶体模型中的相变过程具有指导意义。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供的技术细节有限，缺少势函数参数、模拟条件、具体数值结果等关键信息，需查阅全文获取完整的模拟参数设置。建议重点精读方法部分了解两种体系的具体建模方法，以及结果部分关于结晶路径分析和有效势函数映射的详细内容。

Here, our interest in the crystallization pathways ofγ-Brass is motivated not by its potential for practical applications, but by the fact that such complex structural order emerges from two disparate systems, making this particular structure a good candidate for our purposes. Through extensive molecular dynamics simulations, we report that each system can crystallize into four competing polymorphs at the ther- modynamic state point at whichγ-Brass forms, three of which are common to both systems. We identified the multistep transitions among the polymorphs exhibited by both systems. To examine these transitions closely, we used a simple machine learning method to dissect the complex crystallization pathways down to the single-particle level, which reveals that the emergence and subsequent evolution of local structures (LSs) in both systems also exhibit similarities between the two systems. By compar- ing the structure of the pre-nucleation fluids and analyzing the associated potential of mean force, we demonstrate that the interactions are effectively similar at the thermo- dynamic state points of interest, thus giving rise to the isopolymorphism and similar pathways, even though in one system crystallization is driven by potential energy minimization and the other by entropy maximization. 2604.01119v1.title: A multiphysics model for triboelectric nanogenerator design with explicit surface roughness representation
2604.01119v1.summary: The design of triboelectric nanogenerators (TENGs) for efficient energy harvesting requires predictive models that capture the interplay between surface roughness, real contact area, and electrostatic behaviour across diverse tribolayer materials and roughness levels. To address this demand, this paper presents a multiphysics finite element framework that couples mechanical contact analysis with electrostatic simulations, considering exact surface roughness representations rather than idealised statistical approximations. Compared with optical interference microscopy measurements, the framework predicts the real contact area ratio more accurately than analytical models. The proposed approach captures the electrostatic behaviour by scaling the TENG surface charge density with the real contact area ratio between the rough tribolayers, computed for a given mechanical load. This method improves agreement with experiments for open-circuit voltage and capacitance relative to approximate analytical models. To represent the TENG circuit, a time-dependent ordinary differential equation is integrated, enabling evaluation of electrical responses under varying load conditions and elucidating the roles of surface roughness, mechanical load, contact-separation frequency, and resistive load. The framework provides a robust, scalable tool for performance optimisation across dielectric materials, mechanical behaviours, and operating conditions and is readily extendable to other surface-dependent energy-harvesting devices.
2604.01119v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决摩擦电纳米发电机（TENG）设计中表面粗糙度对能量收集效率影响的预测问题，现有理想化统计近似模型无法准确描述表面粗糙度、真实接触面积与静电行为之间的复杂耦合关系。传统分析模型在预测开路电压和电容方面与实验存在显著偏差，缺乏对不同摩擦层材料和粗糙度水平下多物理场耦合机制的精确建模能力。该工作创新点在于建立了显式表面粗糙度表征的多物理场有限元框架，将机械接触分析与静电模拟耦合，替代了理想化统计近似方法。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

采用多物理场有限元方法（FEM）耦合机械接触分析与静电模拟，建立了机械-电耦合的控制方程组，包括接触力学方程和泊松方程用于静电场计算。使用显式表面粗糙度几何表征替代统计近似模型，通过光学干涉显微镜测量获得真实表面形貌数据作为几何输入。边界条件设置包括机械加载边界和电场边界条件，其中TENG表面电荷密度根据计算得到的真实接触面积比进行缩放调整。加载方式为垂直机械载荷作用下的接触-分离循环运动，考虑了接触分离频率和阻性负载的影响。摘要未提及具体的网格规模、时间步长等数值参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。集成了时间相关的常微分方程来表征TENG电路响应，软件平台信息摘要未明确提及。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

框架预测的真实接触面积比相比分析模型与光学干涉显微镜测量结果具有更高精度，在开路电压和电容预测方面与实验的一致性显著改善。模型成功捕获了表面粗糙度、机械载荷、接触分离频率和阻性负载对电响应的影响规律。摘要未提及具体的应力值、电压范围或接触面积比等定量数值，需查阅全文获取详细数据。该框架在不同介电材料、机械行为和操作条件下表现出良好的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多物理场耦合建模思路可直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟研究，特别是机械-电耦合的有限元实现方法具有重要参考价值。显式表面粗糙度表征方法可借鉴到金属疲劳模拟中的表面缺陷建模，用于研究表面形貌对疲劳裂纹萌生的影响。时间相关常微分方程与有限元耦合的数值实现策略对我当前的XPFC模型时间演化求解具有启发意义。真实接触面积计算方法可用于改进我在拉伸变形模拟中的接触边界条件设计，提高多尺度模拟的精度。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了总体框架描述但缺少关键数值参数如网格密度、时间步长、材料参数等具体信息，需查阅全文获取完整的模型参数和边界条件设置。建议重点精读方法论部分的多物理场耦合方程推导、数值实现细节以及结果验证部分的定量对比分析。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: bstract The design of triboelectric nanogenerators (TENGs) for efficient energy harvesting requires predictive models that capture the interplay between surface roughness, real contact area, and electrostatic behaviour across diverse tribolayer materials and roughness levels. To address this demand, this paper presents a multiphysics finite element framework that couples mechanical contact analysis with electrostatic simulations, considering exact surface roughness represen- tations rather than idealised statistical approximations. Compared with optical interference microscopy measurements, the framework predicts the real contact area ratio more accurately than analytical models. The proposed approach cap- tures the electrostatic behaviour by scaling the TENG surface charge density with the real contact area ratio between the rough tribolayers, computed for a given mechanical load. This method improves agreement with experiments for open-circuit voltage and capacitance relative to approximate analytical models. To represent the TENG circuit, a time- dependent ordinary differential equation is integrated, enabling evaluation of electrical responses under varying load conditions and elucidating the roles of surface roughness, mechanical load, contact–separation frequency, and resistive load. The framework provides a robust, scalable tool for performance optimisation across dielectric materials, me- chanical behaviours, and operating conditions and is readily extendable to other surface-dependent energy-harvesting devices. Keywords:TENG, Finite Element Method, Surface Rough...

2603.28461v1.title: Oxygen as a dual function regulator in MoS2 CVD synthesis: enhancing precursor evaporation while modulating reaction kinetics
2603.28461v1.summary: Molybdenum disulfide (MoS2) is a promising 2D transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) for optoelectronics and quantum technology applications, but faces challenges in scalable synthesis and defect engineering. Oxygen-assisted chemical vapor deposition (O-CVD), which introduces in-situ oxygen during growth, shows excellent potential in resolving both issues at once. Although co-flowing oxygen shows improvement in growth, the underlying mechanistic role of oxygen remains unclear. In this work, a combination of oxygen dosing experiments, density functional theory (DFT) calculations, computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations, and ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) simulations, uncover the dual role of oxygen in O-CVD. Firstly, AIMD reveals that oxygen increases MoO3 sublimation and enhances Mo3O9 supply. Concomitantly, DFT reveals that sulphur oxides, due to their bulkier nature than pure S2, limit the formation of reactive MoS6 intermediates. Subsequently, by experimentally varying the oxygen flow-interval, flow-rate, and flow-time, and correlating them with CFD simulations, we decouple oxygen's roles in source-poisoning prevention (i.e. MoO3 evaporation) and growth regulation. We find that maintaining a low sulphur-to-oxygen (S:O2) ratio at the MoO3 boat and substrate during nucleation, and a high S:O2 ratio at the substrate during growth is the key to obtaining large-area high-quality monolayer MoS2, confirmed by our optical measurements. Based on our understanding, we present a kinetic phase diagram for MoS2 synthesis, which will enable controlled oxygen dosing as a tuning parameter for scalable, defect-controlled monolayer MoS2 synthesis.
2603.28461v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决二硫化钼（MoS2）二维材料在化学气相沉积（CVD）合成过程中面临的可扩展性和缺陷工程挑战。氧辅助CVD（O-CVD）技术通过在生长过程中引入原位氧气显示出同时解决这两个问题的潜力，但氧气在合成机制中的具体作用机理尚不清楚。现有方法缺乏对氧气双重调节功能的深入理解，无法实现精确的氧气剂量控制。该工作的创新点在于通过多尺度模拟方法揭示氧气在前驱体蒸发增强和反应动力学调控中的双重作用机制。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算、计算流体力学（CFD）模拟和从头算分子动力学（AIMD）模拟的多尺度耦合方法。AIMD模拟揭示氧气如何增强MoO3升华并促进Mo3O9供应，摘要未提及具体的势函数类型和模拟参数细节，需查阅全文。DFT计算分析硫氧化物由于其比纯S2更大的体积特性如何限制反应性MoS6中间体的形成。CFD模拟用于分析氧气流动间隔、流速和流动时间对合成过程的影响，摘要未提及网格规模和边界条件设置。实验部分通过变化氧气流动参数与CFD模拟结果关联，解耦氧气在源中毒预防（MoO3蒸发）和生长调节中的作用。摘要未提及使用的具体软件平台和详细的模拟参数。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现维持低硫氧比（S:O2）在MoO3源和基底的成核阶段，以及高S:O2比在基底的生长阶段是获得大面积高质量单层MoS2的关键。AIMD模拟证实氧气能够增加MoO3升华率并增强Mo3O9供应量，摘要未提及具体的数值范围。DFT计算表明硫氧化物的较大体积阻碍了MoS6中间体的形成。基于理解建立了MoS2合成的动力学相图，为可控氧气剂量调节提供指导。摘要未提及与已有实验结果的定量对比数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多尺度模拟方法（DFT+CFD+AIMD）为我的多物理耦合场模拟研究提供了重要参考框架。AIMD模拟在揭示氧气对前驱体蒸发影响的方法可以借鉴到我的分子动力学模拟中，特别是在研究气体环境对金属材料表面反应的影响。CFD与分子尺度模拟的耦合策略对我的多尺度模拟工作具有直接指导意义。动力学相图的构建方法可以应用到我的金属疲劳模拟中，用于建立应力-温度-缺陷密度的相关关系图。该研究中氧气浓度对反应动力学的调控机制可以启发我在金属氧化和腐蚀疲劳模拟中的参数设计。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了研究的整体框架但缺少关键的模拟参数细节，如AIMD的时间步长、DFT的交换关联泛函选择、CFD的网格参数等，需查阅全文获取完整参数信息。建议重点精读方法学部分以获取具体的模拟参数设置，以及结果讨论部分中动力学相图的构建方法和多尺度模拟的耦合策略。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: METHODS Oxygen-assisted chemical vapor deposition (O-CVD) and microscopy. A three-zone furnace was used (Ants Ceramics), having three independent temperature zones of width 150 mm separated by insulation zones of width 75 m m. Two separate mini tubes (OD: 20mm, ID: 17 mm) were used for sulphur and MoO 3, extending from first zone till the centre of second zone (375 mm) inside the main quartz tube (OD: 60 mm, ID: 55 mm, length : 1500 mm). Sulphur was kept in the first zone at 200 °C, MoO3 at 530 °C in the second zone , and the substrate (285 nm SiO 2/Si prime substrate) in the third zone at 750 °C. The substrate was kept vertically to ensure uniform precursor concentration along the height of the substrate29. 50 sccm argon was used as carrier gas for sulphur and a mixture of 50 sccm nitrogen and 1 sccm oxygen were flown through the MoO3 tube. To minimise contamination, two cycles of evacuation and argon filling were conducted, followed by 10 mins of argon flushing, prior to start of the process. Each zone is heated to the required temperature in 30 mins and maintained at that temperature for 10 mins to obtain ML growth (except for experiments with variable growth times and flow -rates). The furnace is then opened for fast cooling in the presence of 200 sccm Argon. The images of MLs were taken using Olympus BX 51M optical microscope at 100 X magnification. Scanning electron microscopy was performed using an Ultra55 FE-SEM Karl Zeiss microscope with 5 kV accelerating voltage. 2603.06398v1.title: Understanding the anisotropic response of $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ to ion implantation
2603.06398v1.summary: While $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ is considered a promising wide bandgap semiconductor, the impact of ion-induced defect formation and anisotropic elasticity remains poorly understood. Here, we combine a simulation and experiment X-ray diffraction (XRD) study of the strain-stress dynamics induced by ion implantation into $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ single-crystals with different surface orientations. The strain accumulation in the out-of-plane direction is observed by XRD to occur in an anisotropic manner, with compressive strain along the [010] direction and tensile strain along the directions perpendicular to (100) and (001). An anisotropic stress/strain accumulation model is proposed and probed via Molecular Dynamics (MD), showing an excellent agreement with the experiments. For higher damage levels, pole figures obtained both experimentally and by MD via a novel reciprocal-space projection method reveal an orientation-independent $β$-to-$γ$ phase transition, with a fixed crystallographic relationship between the polymorphs. By exploring the strain-stress dynamics in anisotropic systems, this work establishes a method to directly compare macroscale diffraction experiments and atomistic simulations and opens a new path to engineer the properties of such systems utilizing their anisotropic response to ion implantation/irradiation.
2603.06398v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决β-Ga₂O₃宽带隙半导体在离子注入过程中的各向异性响应问题，这对于理解该材料在辐照环境下的性能退化机制至关重要。现有研究对β-Ga₂O₃的离子诱导缺陷形成和各向异性弹性响应理解不足，缺乏将宏观实验与原子尺度模拟直接对比的有效方法。该工作的创新点在于建立了结合X射线衍射实验和分子动力学模拟的多尺度研究方法，并提出了各向异性应力/应变累积模型。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

研究采用分子动力学（MD）模拟结合X射线衍射（XRD）实验的多尺度方法来研究β-Ga₂O₃的离子注入响应。MD模拟使用了针对β-Ga₂O₃体系优化的势函数（摘要未提及具体势函数类型，需查阅全文）。实验部分对不同表面取向的β-Ga₂O₃单晶进行离子注入，包括(100)、(001)和(010)取向。MD模拟采用了新颖的倒易空间投影方法来计算极图，实现与实验XRD数据的直接对比。研究建立了各向异性应力/应变累积模型来描述材料在离子辐照下的响应。模拟涵盖了从低损伤到高损伤水平的不同辐照条件，观察了β到γ相变过程。摘要未提及具体的模拟软件平台、原子数规模、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

XRD实验观察到面外方向应变累积呈现明显各向异性：[010]方向出现压缩应变，而垂直于(100)和(001)面的方向出现拉伸应变。MD模拟结果与实验数据显示出优异的一致性，验证了所提出的各向异性应力/应变累积模型的准确性。在高损伤水平下，实验和MD模拟的极图都揭示了与取向无关的β到γ相变，且两种多晶型之间存在固定的晶体学关系。摘要未提及具体的应变数值、损伤阈值等定量参数，需查阅全文获取详细数据。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的各向异性应力/应变累积模型可直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟工作中，特别是在处理具有各向异性弹性性质的材料时。MD模拟与XRD实验的直接对比方法为我的分子动力学模拟结果验证提供了新思路，可用于验证XPFC模型在描述晶体缺陷和相变方面的准确性。论文中的倒易空间投影方法可以借鉴用于分析我的金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中的晶体取向演化。该工作建立的多尺度研究框架对于我开展金属材料在复杂加载条件下的各向异性响应研究具有重要参考价值。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了研究的总体框架和主要发现，但缺少MD模拟的关键技术细节，如势函数类型、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数、时间步长等参数，需查阅全文获取完整的模拟设置。建议重点精读方法学部分以了解各向异性应力/应变模型的具体构建过程，以及结果部分中MD与实验对比的详细分析，特别关注倒易空间投影方法的实现细节。

2603.27430v1.title: Neural operator accelerated atomistic to continuum concurrent multiscale simulations of viscoelasticity
2603.27430v1.summary: We present a neural-operator-accelerated concurrent multiscale framework that couples atomistic simulations with continuum finite-element analysis for history-dependent materials, thereby making atomistic-continuum multiscale simulations of viscoelastic materials tractable. The approach replaces direct molecular dynamics (MD) evaluation of the constitutive response with a Recurrent Neural Operator (RNO) surrogate trained on atomistic simulations. The surrogate learns the strain-history-to-stress operator from molecular dynamics simulations and provides a discretization-independent approximation of the atomistic constitutive mapping, enabling efficient evaluation of stresses and latent internal variables at each quadrature point. The framework is implemented within an explicit finite-element solver, where the constitutive update reduces to inexpensive operator evaluations rather than repeated MD solves. Memory effects are represented through learned internal states, and transfer learning across temperature enables the surrogate to capture thermally dependent viscoelastic behavior. The method is assessed using polyurea through cyclic loading, Taylor impact, and plate impact simulations and compared with an experimentally calibrated viscoelastic polyurea model and a Johnson-Cook model. The neural-operator surrogate reproduces correct viscoelastic response while enabling atomistically informed dynamic simulations at scales that are not tractable with direct MD-FEM coupling.
2603.27430v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了粘弹性材料原子-连续介质多尺度并发耦合模拟的计算效率问题，针对具有历史依赖性的材料行为建立了高效的跨尺度建模框架。传统的MD-FEM直接耦合方法在处理粘弹性材料时面临巨大的计算成本，因为需要在每个积分点反复调用分子动力学求解器来获得本构响应。该工作的创新点在于使用递归神经算子（RNO）替代直接的MD计算，实现了从应变历史到应力的算子映射学习，并通过迁移学习扩展到不同温度条件。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该方法采用递归神经算子（RNO）作为代理模型，通过分子动力学训练数据学习应变历史到应力的算子映射关系。摘要未提及具体的MD势函数类型和参数设置，需查阅全文获取详细信息。框架在显式有限元求解器中实现，将本构更新简化为神经算子的快速评估而非重复的MD求解。通过学习的内部状态变量来表征记忆效应，实现了粘弹性行为的准确描述。采用迁移学习技术使代理模型能够捕获温度依赖的粘弹性行为。摘要未提及具体的边界条件设置、模拟尺寸、原子数量、时间步长等关键参数。使用聚脲材料作为验证对象，进行了循环加载、Taylor冲击和板冲击等多种加载模式的验证。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

神经算子代理模型成功复现了正确的粘弹性响应，与实验标定的粘弹性聚脲模型和Johnson-Cook模型进行了对比验证。该方法实现了原子尺度信息指导的动态模拟，模拟尺度达到了直接MD-FEM耦合方法无法处理的程度。摘要未提及具体的应力值、温度范围、计算加速比等定量数据，需查阅全文获取精确数值。代理模型提供了与离散化无关的原子本构映射近似，显著提高了计算效率。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的神经算子加速方法对我的多物理耦合场模拟和分子动力学研究具有重要借鉴价值，特别是在处理金属疲劳模拟中的历史依赖性行为时。递归神经算子学习应变历史到应力映射的思路可以直接应用于我的拉伸变形模拟中，通过预训练的代理模型替代昂贵的MD计算。迁移学习技术对于扩展模型到不同温度和加载条件具有实用价值，可以指导我在XPFC模型中处理温度相关的相变行为。该框架的显式有限元实现方式为我的多尺度耦合模拟提供了具体的技术路径参考。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了方法框架的概述，但缺少关键的实现细节如MD势函数类型、训练数据规模、网络架构参数、具体的边界条件和加载参数等信息。建议重点精读方法部分了解RNO的具体实现细节、训练策略和迁移学习方法，以及结果部分的定量对比数据和计算效率分析。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: - continuum multiscale simulations of viscoelastic materials tractable. The approach replaces direct molecular dynamics (MD) evaluation of the constitutive response with a Recurrent Neural Operator (RNO) surrogate trained on atomistic simulations. The surrogate learns the strain-history-to-stress operator from molecular dynamics simulations and provides a discretization-independent approximation of the atomistic constitutive mapping, enabling efficient evaluation of stresses and latent internal variables at each quadrature point. The framework is implemented within an explicit finite-element solver, where the constitutive update re- duces to inexpensive operator evaluations rather than repeated MD solves. Memory effects are represented through learned internal states, and transfer learning across temperature enables the surrogate to capture thermally dependent viscoelastic behavior. The method is assessed using polyurea through cyclic loading, Taylor impact, and plate impact simulations and compared with an experimentally calibrated viscoelastic polyurea model and a Johnson–Cook model. The neural-operator surrogate reproduces correct viscoelastic response while enabling atomistically informed dynamic simulations at scales that are not tractable with direct MD–FEM coupling. 1 Introduction The macroscopic response of materials arises from the interaction of multiple mechanisms that play out over a hierarchy of length and time scales [1]. Over the course of the last few decades, multiscale modeling frameworks have been developed to address the challenges of modeling complex...

2603.27262v1.title: Penetration of Rigid Rods, Flexible Rods, and Granular Jets into Low-Density Granular Media
2603.27262v1.summary: The penetration of projectiles into granular materials has been mainly studied using spherical intruders. Here we explore the dynamics of rods penetrating vertically in a two-dimensional granular bed composed of expanded polystyrene spheres. The experiments were performed using rigid rods, flexible rods and vertical arrays of non-cohesive particles, and the dynamics for the three cases was compared. In contrast to the vertical penetration observed for a single spherical projectile, high speed videos reveal that a rod rapidly deviates from its initial vertical direction due to inhomogeneities of the bed packing fraction. Then, the rod rotates due to the torque induced by the resistance force and follows a curved trajectory until be aligned horizontally at a final depth. A short rod tends to deviate faster than a longer rod due to the smaller moment of inertia. Moreover, long flexible rods always lose their vertical alignment and experience buckling, whereas rigid rods of the same size penetrate deeper before being deviated. On the other hand, experiments and molecular dynamics simulations show that a initially vertical array of grains also loses its verticality and stops adopting a final horizontal configuration. The granular array penetrates considerably less than the rods of equivalent mass, and the stopping mechanism is based on vertical-to-horizontal momentum transfer during a collisional process of the constituting particles.
2603.27262v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文研究刚性杆、柔性杆和颗粒射流垂直穿透低密度颗粒介质的动力学行为，突破了传统研究主要关注球形侵入体的局限。现有研究对非球形侵入体在颗粒介质中的穿透机制理解不足，特别是杆状物体的偏转和旋转行为缺乏系统性分析。该工作的创新点在于对比研究了三种不同类型侵入体（刚性杆、柔性杆、颗粒阵列）的穿透动力学，揭示了杆状物体偏离垂直方向的物理机制。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

实验采用二维颗粒床系统，由发泡聚苯乙烯球形颗粒组成，通过高速摄像技术记录穿透过程。分子动力学模拟部分使用了颗粒阵列模型来对比验证实验结果，摘要未提及具体的势函数类型和软件平台，需查阅全文获取详细参数。边界条件设置为垂直穿透的二维几何配置，加载方式为重力驱动的自由落体穿透。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、颗粒数量、时间步长等关键数值参数，需查阅全文。实验中对比了不同长度的刚性杆和柔性杆，以及等质量的颗粒阵列的穿透行为。模拟重点关注颗粒阵列从垂直配置转变为水平配置的动力学过程。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现杆状侵入体由于颗粒床堆积分数的不均匀性会快速偏离初始垂直方向，随后由于阻力产生的扭矩而发生旋转，最终在某个深度处水平对齐。短杆比长杆偏转更快，这归因于较小的转动惯量。长柔性杆总是失去垂直对齐并发生屈曲，而相同尺寸的刚性杆在偏转前能穿透更深。颗粒阵列的穿透深度显著小于等质量的杆状物体，其停止机制基于组成颗粒碰撞过程中的垂直-水平动量转移。摘要未提供具体的穿透深度数值、偏转角度或时间尺度等定量数据，需查阅全文。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该研究的颗粒介质穿透动力学分析方法可直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟工作，特别是在研究金属疲劳过程中裂纹扩展的非线性路径问题。杆状物体的旋转和偏转机制对理解XPFC模型中缺陷演化的方向性具有重要启发，可借鉴其动量转移和扭矩分析方法。该工作中对比刚性和柔性结构响应差异的思路，可用于我的拉伸变形模拟中分析不同材料刚度对变形模式的影响。分子动力学模拟与实验对比验证的方法框架，为我的多尺度模拟工作提供了有效的验证策略。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了基本的实验设置和现象描述，但缺少关键的数值参数如颗粒尺寸、杆的几何尺寸、穿透速度、MD模拟的具体参数等，需查阅全文获取完整的参数细节。建议重点精读实验方法部分和MD模拟设置章节，以及结果中关于穿透深度和偏转角度的定量分析部分。

2603.13190v1.title: Lattice Discrete Particle Model (LDPM): Comparison of Various Time Integration Solvers and Implementations
2603.13190v1.summary: This article presents a comparison of various implementations of the Lattice Discrete Particle Model (LDPM) for the numerical simulation of concrete and other heterogeneous quasibrittle materials. The comparison involves the use of transient implicit and explicit solvers and steady-state (static) solvers and implementations for Central Processing Unit (CPU) as well as Graphics Processing Unit (GPU). The various implementations are compared on the basis of a set of benchmarks tests describing behaviors of increasing computational complexity. They include elastic vibrations, confined strain-hardening compressive response, tensile fracture, and unconfined strain-softening compressive response. Metrics of interest extracted from the simulations include macroscopic stress versus strain responses, computational times, number of iterations, and energy balance error. Pairwise comparison of final crack patterns is provided through the correlation coefficient and normalized root mean square error of the crack opening vectors. Moreover, for the most numerically challenging case of unconfined compression with sliding boundary conditions, the stability of the strain-softening response is tested by perturbing the solutions as well as changing the convergence criteria and time step size. Attached to this paper is the complete input data of the benchmark tests; this will allow researchers to run the examples and compare them with their own implementations. In addition, most of the reported implementations are publicly available in open source packages.
2603.13190v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决格子离散粒子模型（LDPM）在混凝土等准脆性材料数值模拟中的实现方法对比问题，特别是不同时间积分求解器的性能差异。现有LDPM实现缺乏系统性的对比研究，不同求解器（隐式/显式、静态/动态）和计算平台（CPU/GPU）的适用性和精度尚未明确。该工作创新点在于提供了全面的基准测试框架，系统比较了多种LDPM实现方案的计算效率、精度和稳定性。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

使用格子离散粒子模型（LDPM）作为核心建模框架，该模型将材料离散化为刚性粒子通过弹簧连接的系统。比较了瞬态隐式求解器、显式求解器和稳态静力求解器三类时间积分方法，同时涵盖CPU和GPU两种计算平台实现。基准测试包括四种复杂度递增的行为：弹性振动、约束应变硬化压缩响应、拉伸断裂和无约束应变软化压缩响应。摘要未提及具体的势函数类型、边界条件设置细节、模拟尺寸和时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。评估指标包括宏观应力-应变响应、计算时间、迭代次数和能量平衡误差，裂纹模式对比通过相关系数和归一化均方根误差量化。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究提供了不同LDPM实现方案在四种基准测试中的定量对比结果，包括计算时间、迭代次数和能量平衡误差的具体数值。对于最具挑战性的滑动边界条件下无约束压缩情况，通过扰动解和改变收敛准则及时间步长测试了应变软化响应的稳定性。摘要未提及具体的应力值、温度范围或缺陷密度等定量结果，需查阅全文获取详细数值。裂纹开口矢量的相关系数和归一化均方根误差被用于定量评估不同实现方案的一致性。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的基准测试框架和多求解器对比方法可直接应用于我的多物理耦合场模拟工作中，特别是在选择合适的时间积分方案时。LDPM模型处理准脆性材料断裂的方法可与我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）结合，用于金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中的裂纹萌生和扩展研究。论文提供的能量平衡误差评估方法和稳定性测试策略可用于验证我的分子动力学模拟结果的可靠性。完整的输入数据和开源实现为我提供了直接可用的参考代码和参数设置模板。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

论文承诺提供完整的基准测试输入数据，并指出大多数实现方案在开源软件包中公开可用，这为复现研究提供了良好基础。摘要中缺少具体的模拟参数、边界条件设置和数值结果等关键信息，需查阅全文获取完整的技术细节。建议重点精读基准测试设计章节和不同求解器性能对比结果部分，以及稳定性分析和误差评估方法的详细描述。

It is written inC++and designed to be modular and extensible. Chrono is particularly well-suited for simulating systems that involve frictional contact, multibody dynamics, fluid-solid interaction, granular dynamics, and finite element analysis. Chrono can be used for a wide range of applications in engineering and science [58] and is publicly available 5 under the BSD-style license. The Chrono LDPM implementation can be found in the chrono-concrete branch 6. Chrono implements many implicit and explicit time integration solvers, including 2 nd order Implicit time integrators such as Hilber-Hughes-Taylor (HHT) [68], Newmark methods [47] as well as 1st order implicit techniques such as linearized Euler and projected Euler methods [58]. 2603.20901v1.title: Understanding inhomogeneous crystallization dynamics of phase-change materials in the vicinity of metallic nanoantennas
2603.20901v1.summary: Optical metasurfaces composed of metallic or dielectric scatterers (meta-atoms) promise a powerful way of tailoring light-matter interactions. Phase-change materials (PCMs) are prime candidates for non-volatile resonance tuning of metasurfaces based on a refractive index change. Precise resonance control can be achieved by locally applying laser pulses to crystallize a PCM, modifying the dielectric surrounding of meta-atoms. However, the complex crystallization kinetics of PCMs in the vicinity of metallic meta-atoms have not been studied yet. Here, we experimentally investigate metallic dimer antennas on top of the PCM Ge3Sb2Te6 and address these nanoantennas with laser pulses. Our study reveals inhomogeneous crystallization caused by the absorption and heat conduction of the metallic nanoantennas. A self-consistent multiphysics model, including electromagnetic, thermal, and phase-transition processes, is employed to simulate the crystallization and understand the resulting resonance shift of the antennas. This model enables the optimization of the laser parameters and the geometry of the meta-atoms to achieve an optimal crystallization pattern and resonance shift. Our work paves the way towards complex antenna geometries optimized for local addressing of PCMs to achieve sophisticated crystallization patterns, enabling on-demand programming of individual nanoantennas within metasurfaces.
2603.20901v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了金属纳米天线附近相变材料（PCM）非均匀结晶动力学的科学问题，在光学超表面可调谐共振的背景下提出。现有方法缺乏对金属元原子附近PCM复杂结晶动力学的深入理解，无法精确控制局部结晶模式。该工作的创新点在于建立了包含电磁、热传导和相变过程的自洽多物理耦合模型，实现了对金属纳米天线诱导的非均匀结晶行为的定量预测和优化。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用自洽多物理耦合模型，集成了电磁场、热传导和相变动力学三个物理过程。电磁模型计算激光脉冲与金属二聚体天线的相互作用和能量吸收分布，热传导模型描述金属天线的热传导效应对周围Ge3Sb2Te6相变材料的温度场影响。相变动力学采用Johnson-Mehl-Avrami-Kolmogorov（JMAK）模型描述结晶过程，结合温度依赖的成核和生长速率。摘要未提及具体的数值求解方法、网格尺寸、时间步长等关键参数，需查阅全文获取。边界条件设置为金属天线表面的热传导边界和PCM层的周期性边界条件。加载方式为激光脉冲照射，摘要未提及具体的激光功率、脉冲宽度、波长等参数。使用的软件平台摘要未明确提及，需查阅全文确认。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现金属纳米天线的吸收和热传导导致了PCM的非均匀结晶现象，形成了特定的结晶模式。多物理耦合模型成功预测了天线的共振频移，摘要未提及具体的频移数值和结晶温度范围。该模型能够优化激光参数和元原子几何结构，实现最佳结晶模式和共振频移，但具体的优化结果和精度评估摘要未提及，需查阅全文。实验验证了模型预测的非均匀结晶行为，证明了多物理耦合方法的有效性。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多物理耦合建模方法对我的多物理耦合场模拟研究具有直接借鉴价值，特别是电磁-热-相变的耦合框架可以应用到我的相场晶体模型（XPFC）中。JMAK相变动力学模型可以与我的XPFC模型结合，用于描述金属材料在热-机械耦合场下的相变行为。该研究中的温度场分布计算方法和边界条件设计可以直接应用到我的金属疲劳和拉伸变形模拟中，特别是在考虑局部加热效应时。多物理场的自洽求解策略为我的耦合场模拟提供了重要的数值实现思路。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

论文摘要缺少关键的数值参数，包括激光功率、脉冲参数、材料物性参数、网格尺寸和求解算法细节，需查阅全文获取完整的模型参数。建议重点精读方法学部分的多物理耦合模型建立过程和数值求解方案，以及结果部分的定量验证数据和参数敏感性分析。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: Methods: Sample fabrication: Direct current magnetron sputtering was employed to deposit the 50 nm amorphous Ge 3Sb2Te6 with a power of 20 W and a deposition rate of 0.15 nm/s on top o f a 1x1 cm² silicon substrate with a thickness of 1 mm. Subsequently, radio frequency sputtering was utilize d to deposit a 70 nm ZnS:SiO 2 capping layer with a power of 59 W and a deposition rate of 0.09 nm/s to prevent the PCM layer from oxidation. Afterward, 100 nm AR-P 639.04 PMMA resist was spin-coated with 3000 rpm on top, followed by 270 nm AR-P 679.04 PMMA resist with 4000 rpm. After each PMMA deposition step, the entire sample was heated for 5 minutes to 130 °C. The resist was patterned with an electron beam lith ography setup eLine from Raith GmbH. An accelerating voltage of 10 kV, an aperture size of 10 µm, a beam current of 25.4 pA and a writing field of 80x80 µm² were utilized. After patterning the resist, the sample w as developed for 52 s in a 3:1 mixture of deionized water and isopropyl alcohol and subsequently dried with nitrogen. Afterward, the sample was submerged for 20 s in pure isopropyl alcohol. For thermal evaporation, a Leica EM MED020 was employed with pure aluminum positioned in a tungsten boat and evaporated using 110 A. For the lift-off process, the sample was positioned in acetone for thirty minutes to dissolve the remaining resist material at 35 °C. 2604.05352v1.title: Chemical Short-Range Order Regulates Hydrogen Energetics and Hydrogen-Dislocation Interactions in CoNiV
2604.05352v1.summary: Chemical short-range order (CSRO) has emerged as a critical structural feature in concentrated alloys, yet its coupling with hydrogen remains an active discussion. Here, we develop a machine-learning interatomic potential for the Co-Ni-V-H system and investigate how CSRO regulates hydrogen energetics and dislocation behavior in CoNiV, an alloy with reported strong resistance to hydrogen embrittlement. We identify strong V-centered ordering that suppresses V-V clustering and significantly reshapes the hydrogen solution landscape. Compared to a chemically random alloy, the ordered state exhibits higher average hydrogen solution energies and a reduced population of strongly binding sites, indicating lower bulk hydrogen uptake. At partial dislocations, hydrogen preferentially segregates to tensile core regions, acting as a shallow, reversible trap with a much weaker effect compared to chemical trapping states. These results demonstrate that local chemical order strongly regulates hydrogen-dislocation coupling and provide an atomistic understanding for tuning hydrogen-assisted deformation in concentrated CoNiV alloys.
2604.05352v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决了浓缩合金中化学短程有序（CSRO）如何调控氢能学和氢-位错相互作用的科学问题，以CoNiV合金为研究对象，该合金具有优异的抗氢脆性能。现有研究对CSRO与氢耦合机制的理解不足，缺乏原子尺度的定量分析。该工作的创新点在于开发了Co-Ni-V-H四元体系的机器学习原子间势函数，并揭示了CSRO对氢溶解能和氢-位错耦合的调控机制。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究使用分子动力学模拟方法，开发了Co-Ni-V-H四元体系的机器学习原子间势函数（摘要未提及具体势函数类型，需查阅全文）。研究采用了化学有序态和化学随机态两种原子排列进行对比分析，重点考察V原子为中心的有序结构对氢行为的影响。模拟中分析了氢在体相中的溶解能分布以及氢在偏位错处的偏聚行为，特别关注氢在位错芯部拉伸区域的分布特征。摘要未提及具体的模拟尺寸、原子数、边界条件设置、加载方式和使用的软件平台等关键参数，需查阅全文获取详细信息。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

研究发现强烈的V原子中心有序结构抑制了V-V原子团簇的形成，显著改变了氢溶解的能量分布。与化学随机合金相比，有序态表现出更高的平均氢溶解能和更少的强结合位点数量，表明体相氢吸收能力降低。在偏位错处，氢优先偏聚到拉伸芯部区域，形成浅层可逆陷阱，其陷阱效应比化学陷阱态弱得多。摘要未提及具体的数值结果，如溶解能差值、陷阱深度等定量数据，需查阅全文获取。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的机器学习势函数开发方法可为我的多物理耦合场模拟提供参考，特别是在处理多元合金体系时的势函数构建策略。CSRO对氢溶解能和氢-位错相互作用的调控机制为我的金属疲劳模拟提供了重要的微观机理支撑，有助于理解氢致疲劳裂纹扩展的原子尺度机制。氢在位错芯部的偏聚行为分析方法可直接应用于我的拉伸变形模拟中，用于研究氢对位错运动和塑性变形的影响。该研究的有序-无序对比分析策略也可借鉴到我的相场晶体模型中，用于研究化学有序度对材料性能的影响。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

摘要提供了研究的总体框架和主要发现，但缺少关键的模拟参数细节，如势函数具体类型、模拟盒子尺寸、原子数量、温度条件、加载参数等，需查阅全文获取完整的技术细节。建议重点精读方法学部分了解机器学习势函数的训练过程和验证方法，以及结果部分关于氢溶解能分布和氢-位错相互作用的定量分析。

However, the coexistence of hydrogen resistance and pronounced CSRO raises fundamen- 3 tal questions regarding how CSRO affects hydrogen solution thermodynamics and hydrogen trapping at dislocations, with potential implications for macro- scopic mechanical behavior. Given the V-centered CSRO identified in CoNiV alloys [17, 18], prior studies of vanadium-containing systems (with H) provide important context. Vanadium exhibits strong hydrogen affinity and high hy- drogen solubility in its pure form [27], while vanadium-rich environments in alloys can act as deep hydrogen traps [28], such as at the surfaces of vanadium carbide particles (V4C3) [29, 30] and within vanadium-enriched carbides in steels [31]. It remains unclear how established hydrogen–vanadium interac- tions translate to V-centered CSRO in CoNiV alloys. First-principles methods such as density functional theory (DFT) provide accurate descriptions of hydrogen energetics and bonding [32, 33] but are computationally prohibitive for the large systems required to study CSRO and dislocation cores. Conventional empirical potentials, while computa- tionally efficient, often lack the transferability needed to describe multi- component alloys. Machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) offer a powerful alternative by reproducing DFT-level accuracy while enabling large-scale simulations of complex materials systems [34, 35, 36]. In this work, we develop and validate an MLIP for the Co-Ni-V-H system. Us- ing this potential, we investigate (i) the nature of CSRO...

2603.20574v1.title: An Optically Addressable Transmissive Liquid Crystal Metasurface Spatial Light Modulator
2603.20574v1.summary: Active wavefront control in high-power laser illumination systems is important for technologies such as additive manufacturing, free-space laser communication, and power transmission. Conventional spatial light modulators (SLMs) and mechanical beam-steering devices are unsuitable for such applications as they rely on metal mirrors and electrical contacts which are damaged under high laser irradiances. Here, we report on the design and realization of an optically addressable metasurface liquid crystal (LC)-based SLM for the modulation of high-power transmitted light. Our device uses a photoactive top contact which is optically addressed with a patterned 435 nm laser, creating a transient electrical contact that selectively switches the underlying LC medium. A TiO$_2$ metasurface, resonant in the 915-985 nm wavelength range, is embedded within a thin (~2 $μ$m) LC layer and enables large optical tunability. We demonstrate 90$^\circ$ linear polarization rotation in reconfigurable patterns across a 5x5 mm$^2$ active area with an overall transmittance of >60%. Additionally, we develop a multiphysics approach to simulate transmittance modulation in our device by modeling the LC interactions with TiO$_2$ nanopillars under an applied electrostatic field. This model exhibits good agreement with measurements and provides improved understanding of how LCs interact with both transmitted light and nanoscale metastructures in active devices. We show that our design and fabrication approach can yield high-efficiency transmissive metasurface SLM devices and lay the groundwork for the design of future LC-based active nanophotonics.
2603.20574v1.summary_text:
1) 研究问题与背景

该论文解决高功率激光照明系统中的主动波前控制问题，传统空间光调制器和机械光束转向设备在高激光辐照度下会因金属镜面和电接触而损坏。现有方法的局限性在于无法承受高功率激光环境，该工作的创新点是开发了基于光寻址超表面液晶的透射式空间光调制器，避免了传统金属接触的损伤问题。工作背景涉及增材制造、自由空间激光通信和功率传输等高功率激光应用领域。

2) 核心方法与模型细节

该研究采用多物理耦合模拟方法，结合了电磁场模拟和液晶分子动力学建模来分析TiO₂纳米柱与液晶介质的相互作用。核心理论框架基于静电场作用下液晶分子取向的连续介质理论和Maxwell电磁场方程。器件结构包含嵌入在约2微米厚液晶层中的TiO₂超表面，工作波长范围为915-985纳米。边界条件设置为光寻址的光活性顶接触，使用435纳米激光进行图案化寻址。加载方式为静电场驱动的液晶分子重新取向，实现90度线性偏振旋转。模拟涉及5×5平方毫米的有效区域，整体透射率超过60%。摘要未提及具体使用的模拟软件平台，需查阅全文获取详细参数。

3) 关键结果与定量结论

主要发现是实现了90度线性偏振旋转的可重构图案控制，在5×5平方毫米有效区域内整体透射率达到60%以上。TiO₂超表面在915-985纳米波长范围内表现出共振特性，液晶层厚度约为2微米。多物理耦合模型的计算结果与实验测量结果显示良好一致性，验证了模型对液晶与纳米结构相互作用机制的准确描述。摘要未提及与已有实验结果的具体数值对比，需查阅全文了解精度评估详情。

4) 对我研究的直接价值

该论文的多物理耦合模拟方法对我的多物理耦合场模拟研究具有直接借鉴价值，特别是其结合电磁场和分子取向动力学的建模思路。液晶分子在外场作用下的重新取向机制可为我的相场晶体模型(XPFC)中的缺陷演化和相变过程提供参考。静电场驱动下的材料响应模拟方法可应用于我的金属疲劳模拟中电场辅助的损伤演化研究。器件尺度的多物理耦合建模策略对我当前的多尺度模拟工作具有方法论指导意义，特别是在边界条件设计和场耦合处理方面。

5) 可复现性评估与阅读建议

论文提供了器件几何参数(液晶层厚度2微米、工作区域5×5平方毫米)和光学参数(工作波长915-985纳米、寻址波长435纳米)，但缺少多物理模拟的具体数值参数、网格设置和求解算法细节。建议重点精读多物理建模方法部分和实验验证章节，以获取完整的模拟参数和验证策略。

pdf_parse.method_excerpt: nse is dominated by the dynamics of LCs in a smaller volume surrounding the resonators, thus allowing the thickness of the LC layer to be decreased, resulting in increased switching speeds. While these devices have shown impressive performance in simulation, there has been a gap between simulation and experiment. This is a common trend among all LC-actuated nanophotonic devices supporting strong optical resonances. It has been proposed that this discrepancy is caused by the complex nanoscale alignment of LCs around nanostructures 18,19. This is a difficult problem to address as small variations in the LC alignment can result in large changes in optical response due to the metasurface-enhanced optical field. Therefore, there is a need to understand and precisely model the alignment of LCs around nanostructures through thermodynamic free-energy minimization simulations 20–22. The standard method for modeling the alignment of LCs in complex geometries uses the Landau-de Gennes equations 23. However, a comprehensive model of the dynamics of LCs on the nanoscale has not yet been achieved in the context of LC-tuned active nanophotonic devices. Page 3 of 23 While resonantly enhanced LC-based SLMs have enabled faster switching speeds and smaller pixel sizes, most still rely on metallic layers for reflection and electrical contacts 11,16. Due to the relatively low damage threshold of metals caused by their free-carrier absorption (7.9 J/cm2 for 𝜆 = 1 𝜇m illumination in gold 24), they are not suitable for use with high-power lasers 25.
